title: AI Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 7 figure days with conversion-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale. BEING ABLE TO WORK WITH (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3) IS A MUST! 



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (60–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $5 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses up to $1000 per video.



What You’ll Do

- Work with AI UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta (60–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Be a professional using (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads, send us your whatsapp number



Its a big + if you have 
 training!*

title: Shopify Customer Service Support
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized, fast-thinking and dedicated customer support specialist to join our growing remote team.



We are a recent and fast-growing e-commerce brand specializing in aesthetic and high-quality phone cases, serving customers worldwide. As we continue to scale, customer service remains one of the most important pillars of our business and we are looking for someone who truly cares about delivering an exceptional experience.





— Role Overview

You will be responsible for handling customer support across our e-commerce operations. This is a fast-paced environment with a relatively high volume of tickets, and you will play a key role in maintaining customer satisfaction and brand reputation.

We provide full training to ensure your integration is as smooth as possible.





— A Typical Day Includes

- Responding to customer
s promptly and professionally

- Tracking orders and providing updates

- Resolving complaints and handling return or refund inquiries

- Coordinating with suppliers to resolve issues such as returned to sender, lost orders, or product quality concerns

- Ensuring all customer interactions are handled with care, clarity and efficiency





— Performance Expectations

- Maintain response times within 6 hours

- Deliver high-quality, empathetic, brand-aligned and solution-oriented support

- Handle multiple conversations at once while staying organized and detail-focused

We take customer service very seriously and expect someone who is genuinely willing to give their best every day.





— Requirements

- Strong written communication skills in English (at least 9/10)

- Highly organized, detail-oriented and proactive

- Able to work independently and as part of a team

- Comfortable handling a high volume of tickets

- Reliable internet connection and proper work setup

- Experience with Shopify and Re:amaze is a strong plus





— Important

- This role is not suitable for candidates who struggle with organization, consistency or handling multiple conversations at once

- This is not for people who are not fully committed or not willing to put in effort, dedication and contribute to a strong team environment and to the brand's growth

- We are a fast-growing startup with high expectations and things move quickly, so adaptability is essential

- Punctuality and reliability are extremely important

- Occasional weekend coverage may be required





— Growth Opportunities

Because we are a relatively new and fast-growing brand with a small team, the selected candidates will have a very high probability of growing with us quickly.

High performers can expect opportunities to be promoted in the short term, including roles such as Customer Service Manager.

Bonuses based on performance can also be discussed. We value dedication and high performance, and strong contributors will always be recognized and rewarded.

title: GEO Specialist (Generative Engine Optimization)
description:
About the Role

AI-powered search is changing the way shoppers discover pools and outdoor living spaces. When a customer asks ChatGPT "luxury pool design" or uses Google AI Overviews to compare pool builders, we want Calimingo Pools to be the brand they're pointed to — and the one ranking when they search traditionally too.

We're looking for an experienced GEO Specialist to own Calimingo's entire search presence. In 2026, great GEO means mastering both the traditional foundations that Google still rewards and the AI-first strategies that determine who gets cited, recommended, and discovered on the platforms where buyers are increasingly turning first. This is a hands-on freelance role with real impact across every search surface.



What You'll Do

- Own Calimingo's full search visibility strategy — from Google rankings to AI-generated answers

- Audit our content and digital presence for discoverability, citation potential, and technical search health

- Develop keyword and topic strategies, on-page content, and link-building initiatives alongside a GEO roadmap

- Optimize product pages, category content, and editorial articles for both Google and LLM readability — structured content, clear heading hierarchies, and answer-first formats that AI engines can extract and cite

- Build Calimingo's topical authority and entity signals so search engines and AI tools alike associate our brand with luxury pools, pool design, and outdoor living

- Manage technical search foundations — site architecture, crawlability, page speed, internal linking, and Core Web Vitals

- Implement schema markup across the site (FAQPage, Product, Article, Organization) to support both rich results and AI citation

- Identify citation opportunities across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Microsoft Copilot, and Gemini

- Pursue earned media placements — features, directories, and review platforms — that strengthen both backlink profiles and AI multi-source authority

- Monitor and report on performance across all channels: organic rankings, traffic, AI citation frequency, and share of voice

- Keep content regularly refreshed with updated data and "Last Updated" signals to stay competitive in both Google and AI retrieval

- Implement and maintain content directly on the Calimingo website via WordPress





What We're Looking For



Must-have skills:

- Proven experience in Generative Engine Optimization with a strong command of the traditional search foundations that underpin it

- Strong understanding of how LLMs retrieve, rank, and cite content, including RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems

- Solid technical search skills — crawl audits, site architecture, internal linking, page speed, and Core Web Vitals

- Experience with structured data and schema markup, particularly FAQPage, Product, Article, and Organization schemas

- Experience with semantic content architecture, keyword and topic research, and entity-based strategy

- Familiarity with e-commerce content strategy and product-led search optimization

- Ability to conduct comprehensive audits and translate findings into clear, prioritized action plans

- Proficiency with search tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Google Search Console

- Proficiency with AI visibility tracking tools such as Otterly.ai, Ahrefs Brand Radar, BrightEdge, or similar

- Proficiency with ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Copilot, and Gemini for citation monitoring and testing

- WordPress proficiency — comfortable navigating, editing, and publishing content directly on the Calimingo website



Nice to have:

- Experience with digital PR and earning placements on authoritative third-party sources

- Experience with product feed optimization and merchant-facing AI platforms

- Knowledge of knowledge graph optimization and E-E-A-T signals

- Familiarity with agentic search (e.g., OpenAI Operator) and how structured content fits into agent-driven discovery workflows





What Success Looks Like

Within the first 90 days, we expect a comprehensive audit, a prioritized roadmap, and early improvements in how Calimingo appears — in Google results and in AI-generated responses — across searches like "best luxury pool designs," "pool options," and "pool builders near me." Longer term, success means Calimingo is the brand search engines rank and AI tools reach for when someone starts dreaming about their backyard.

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist
description:
WE NEED SOMEONE WITH EXPERIENCE IN HEALTH & WELLNESS AND/OR CONSUMABLE PRODUCTS (e.g. Supplements, powdered drinks, etc.)



Position Type: Full Time

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: Mon-Fri, 9:30am-6:30pm Singapore 

 

About the Company



Our client is a fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer health and wellness brand with sales in the USA and Singapore. Headquartered in Singapore, we operate as a remote-first team across four countries.



Over the last four years, we’ve grown to 7 figures in annual revenue with 60–80% year-on-year growth. As we scale toward 8 figures, we’re building a performance-led marketing engine driven by systems, data, and creative excellence.

 

About the Role



If you’ve only run ads for fashion brands, boosted posts, or content-first accounts, this role is not for you.

 

This role is for a data-driven Meta Ads Creative Strategist who can own the client’s entire Meta ads system, including scripting and media buying, to hit clear revenue, ROAS, CPA, and budget targets.

 

You won’t be guessing or “posting content.” You’ll be building a repeatable system that delivers consistent performance through structured creative testing and optimization.



As a creative strategist, you will fully own:



- Scripting

- Concept ideation

- Creative testing

- Production workflows

- Performance scaling

 

Responsibilities

 

- Strategic Ad Creative System: Build and operate a creative machine delivering 5–10 weekly video ads, tailored to different customer pain points and awareness levels.



- End-to-End Script Development: Write value-based, conversion-driven scripts using direct-response frameworks (AIDA, PAS) and create precise creative briefs for execution.



- Creative Testing Frameworks: Design and run systematic tests (e.g. 5 hooks × 3 angles × 2 lengths = 30 variations) to identify winning patterns.



- Performance Scaling: Launch structured tests with statistical significance, scale winners systematically, kill losers fast, and document learnings.



- Data Analysis & Optimisation: Monitor daily metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, CVR, AOV), refresh creatives weekly to combat fatigue, and deliver monthly reports with actionable insights.



- Creator & Production Management: Coordinate creators in the US and Australia, manage production timelines, quality control output, and build repeatable templates for consistent delivery.



- Budget & ROAS Ownership: Take full ownership of scaling profitably while maintaining target ROAS and building predictable growth models.

 

Competencies and Qualifications



Must-Have



- 3+ years scaling Meta ads for DTC eCommerce brands

- Proven track record managing $5,000+ USD/month profitably

- Has scripted and/or created 30+ short-form video ads

- Strong direct-response copywriting skills (AIDA, PAS, etc.)

- Can clearly explain how CTR, CPM, CVR influence CAC

- Ability to break down funnels and diagnose bottlenecks (e.g. what to fix when CPC rises)

- Experience building systematic creative testing frameworks

- Expert-level proficiency in Meta Ads Manager

- Comfortable owning outcomes, not just execution

 

Nice-to-Have



- Experience managing remote creators and production workflows

- Experience scaling spend beyond $20k+ USD/month

- Strong documentation habits for systems and learnings

- Interest in mentoring or leading a team as the company scales

 

Key Attrributes



- Decisive: Able to make confident, data-backed decisions quickly; scales winners and cuts losers without hesitation

- Inquisitive: Naturally curious about why ads work or fail; constantly tests, questions assumptions, and seeks better angles

- Goal-Oriented: Driven by clear targets (ROAS, CPA, revenue) and focused on outcomes, not activity

- Analytical: Interprets performance metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, CVR, AOV) to diagnose issues and guide creative and scaling decisions

- Detail-Oriented: Meticulous with scripts, test variables, data review, and execution; spots small issues before they become costly problems

title: Merchandise Planner (AU Retail)
description:
WE NEED SOMEONE WITH STRONG DATA ANALYSIS IN INVENTORY CONTROL AND MANAGEMENT FOR RETAIL BUSINESSES (Managed inventory planning for multiple physical retail stores)



Position Type: Full Time

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9AM to 6PM AEST (Fixed)

 

About the Company



Our client is a leading wholesaler that designs, sources, and imports products from around the world for major Australian retailers. Renowned for setting industry trends, they deliver innovative solutions across categories such as apparel, impulse, accessories, and travel luggage. As a market leader in VMI, brand management, licensing, and private label solutions, they design, manufacture, distribute, and manage a diverse portfolio of products and brands across department stores, discount department stores, supermarkets, independent retailers, and pharmacy channels.



About the Role



As a Merchandise Planner (Retail), you will be responsible for leading the Allocation and Store Analysts, ensuring the right product is in the right place at the right time. As planning is the cog that keeps the whole machine running, your role is critical in aligning inventory with demand—managing procurement from China, partnering with sales to forecast needs, and overseeing allocations across both wholesale and retail channels to drive sales performance.

 

Responsibilities



- Lead and support the Allocation & Store Analysts team.

- Ensure stock is allocated to the right stores at the right time, in line with agreed allocation methodologies.

- Analyze future sales forecasts by product and place stock orders to maintain appropriate warehouse inventory levels.

- Identify and action in-store sales opportunities in collaboration with Allocation & Store Analysts to maximize performance.

- Communicate with customers as needed regarding product availability, delivery, or planning updates.

- Coordinate with merchandising on upcoming in-store demand driven by seasonal events (e.g. School Holidays, Easter, Christmas).

- Complete monthly Open-to-Buy (OTB) reviews and reforecasting activities.

- Responsible for seasonal article creation and article master data maintenance.

- Manage monthly purchase order (PO) creation and ensure accuracy of procurement data.

 

Competencies and Qualifications



Must-Have



- Minimum 5 plus years of experience in retail allocations and merchandise planning

- Proven background in multi-store or multi-channel retail operations, with strong hands-on experience in stock allocations 

- Having at least 2 years of management experience with a minimum of 2 direct reports

- Excellent Retail math skills and understanding of excel based allocations

- Demonstrated ability to use data to drive allocation accuracy and improve sales outcomes.

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel, with solid knowledge of intermediate formulas such as XLOOKUP, SUMIFS, COUNTIFS, MROUND, CEILING, and CONCATENATE.

- Skilled in sales forecasting and inventory planning—able to interpret sales trends and plan stock orders to maintain optimal warehouse levels.

- Knowledge of stock allocation principles and methodologies, ensuring accurate and timely stock placement across stores.

- Strong analytical thinking and decision-making skills.

- High attention to detail, including proactive stock management based on external factors (e.g., weather, regional events).

- Accountability and ownership—able to manage key tasks independently without constant reminders.

- Resilience and adaptability in a fast-paced, high-volume environment.

- Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration abilities—comfortable working across sales, merchandising, and customer teams.



Nice-to-Have



- System Proficiency (Planning Tools & ERP Systems): Proficient in using planning and ERP systems such as SAP, Oracle, or JDA, with the ability to efficiently input, manage, and update forecasts.

- Master Data & Purchase Order Management: Experienced in managing seasonal article creation, maintaining master data, and ensuring accurate and timely purchase order (PO) creation.

- Leadership Experience: Minimum of 1–2 years in a leadership or senior-level planning role, with demonstrated ability to guide and support tea
mbers.

 

Technical Requirements



- Computer with a minimum of 16GB RAM

- Intel Core i5 processor (or equivalent).

- Headset (preferable noise canceling microphone)

- Fast/Stable and Reliable Internet Connection (At least 30 Mbps)

- Having 2 external monitor is a plus

- Webcam

 

What We Offer



- 100% Remote Work

- 13th Month Pay

- Healthcare (HMO)

- Complete Benefits Package

- Paid Service Incentive Lead (SIL)

- Paid Philippines Holidays

- Free Learning and Development Programs

 experience is an advantage

title: 2-Year Solution Architect Residency Program (AI-Driven)
description:
Paid · Remote · Highly Selective



Software development as a role has changed.

Execution is no longer the bottleneck.

Architecture, judgment, and learning speed are what matter now.



Location: Remote – Philippines

Schedule: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

Type: Full-Time, Company-Sponsored Residency (Independent Contractor)

Monthly Stipend: ?70,000 – ?90,000 (performance-based progression)



?? Please Read Carefully



This is NOT:



A traditional software developer role

A coding bootcamp

A self-paced or part-time program



This is a full-time, paid residency for individuals who want to move beyond manual execution and into designing, directing, and owning intelligent systems in an AI-first world.



If you are looking for comfort, familiarity, or a conventional developer career path, this is not the right program.



About Us



We are ASG Platform, a US-based technology company with long-standing global operations and a growing presence in the Philippines.



We’ve scaled systems through multiple market shifts by doing one thing consistently well:

adapting earlier than most.



As AI reshapes how software is built, we are evolving how we hire, train, and grow talent—focusing on roles that remain valuable because of AI, not despite it.



???? Company Overview:





Why This Residency Exists



AI can now:



Write code

Review and refactor systems

Execute repetitive technical work faster and more accurately than humans



What AI still needs:



Clear problem framing

System-level thinking

Architecture and decision-making

Human judgment, validation, and accountability



This residency trains AI-Driven Solution Architects—professionals who design systems, guide AI execution, and adapt faster than the market.



When we say “software development is dead,” we don’t mean skills are useless.

We mean the role has evolved—and we’re training for what comes next.



What “Residency” Means Here



Paid, full-time, fixed-term (2 years)

You learn while contributing to real systems

Progression is performance-based, not automatic

Expectations increase over time

High performers grow into higher-responsibility and higher-compensation paths

This is a serious commitment—and a serious opportunity.



What You’ll Actually Do



As a Solution Architect Resident, you will:



Break down complex business and technical problems into structured systems

Design solution architectures (workflows, data flows, decision logic)

Direct AI tools to implement parts of those solutions

Review and validate AI output for accuracy, edge cases, and scalability

Learn complex concepts quickly using structured learning frameworks

Participate in architecture reviews and planning sessions

Gradually take ownership of production-level systems

You will think more than you type—and you will be accountable for outcomes.



Who This Program Is For



You are a strong fit if you:



Learn quickly and deeply

Think in systems, not just tasks

Adapt easily and abandon outdated methods

Prefer responsibility over hand-holding

Care about long-term relevance, not short-term comfort



If you’re curious, adaptable, and willing to rethink how technical work is done—even if you don’t meet every checkbox—we encourage you to apply.



Who This Program Is NOT For



This program is not a fit if you:



Prefer traditional software developer roles

Want to focus primarily on manual coding

Expect step-by-step instructions

Resist AI or automation

Have experience limited mainly to single-user apps or basic website creation



(These backgrounds typically do not pass our qualification process.)



Clarity now prevents frustration later.



How We Evaluate Candidates



We do not evaluate based on how much code you can write.



We assess:



Learning speed

Ability to understand complex material

Attention to detail

Judgment and reasoning

Adaptability to AI-driven workflows



All assessments are paid.

Results are communicated as pass/fail.



Compensation & Benefits



???? Monthly stipend: ?70,000 – ?90,000

???? Performance-based increases

???? Fully remote (Philippines-based)

???? Mentorship from senior architects and engineers

???? Performance bonuses

????? Paid holidays after 6 months



After Year 1:



???? HMO coverage

???? Second internet allowance

???? ?1,000 monthly food & entertainment vouchers

????? Paid time off (tenure-based)

???? Stock options (rare in the PH market)



Stock options are offered after 12 months to high-performing residents—aligning long-term ownership with company growth.



Our Standard



By the end of the residency, successful graduates will have:



Designed and governed AI-powered systems

Proven the ability to adapt faster than industry norms

Operated effectively in an AI-first environment

Earned placement among top-tier technology professionals



Selection is competitive. Most applicants will not pass.

If that motivates you—we want to hear from you.

title: Revenue Manager
description:
Position: Revenue Manager

Company: Corporate stays

Employment Type: Freelancer /Full time

Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Montreal time

Work from home





About Us



Corporate Stays is a global leader in furnished apartments and short-term rental management, with over 1,000 units in Canada and a rapidly growing portfolio across Latin America (Panama, Paraguay, Mexico, Brazil, Chile, Costa Rica).



We operate a portfolio of 300+ units and are scaling quickly, focusing on maximizing revenue, occupancy, and operational efficiency.





Role Overview



We are looking for a data-driven and experienced Revenue Manager to optimize pricing and performance across our international portfolio of short-term rental properties.





This role is critical to driving revenue growth and requires strong analytical skills, experience with dynamic pricing tools (especially PriceLabs), and a deep understanding of STR market dynamics.





Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize pricing strategies across 300+ properties in multiple countries

Configure and manage PriceLabs (base prices, minimum prices, seasonal rules, last-minute discounts)

Monitor occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, and booking pace across all markets

Adjust pricing strategies based on demand, seasonality, and local events

Analyze competitor pricing and market trends

Optimize performance by building (not just by city)

Work closely with Sales, Marketing, and Operations teams

Support direct booking strategy vs OTA distribution (e.g. Airbnb)

Provide weekly performance reports and actionable insights

Continuously test and improve pricing strategies



Requirements



3–5+ years of experience in Revenue Management (STR, hospitality, or hotels)

Proven experience with PriceLabs (mandatory)

Strong understanding of short-term rental platforms (Airbnb, Booking, etc.)

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills

Advanced Excel or data analysis skills

Fluent English (written and spoken)

Ability to manage multiple markets and properties simultaneously

Highly organized and detail-oriented



Nice to Have



Experience in Latin American markets

Experience with PMS systems (Hostaway, Guesty, etc.)

Experience with CRM tools like HubSpot

Background in hotel revenue management



KPIs (Success Metrics)



Revenue growth (RevPAR increase)

Occupancy rate optimization

Pricing accuracy vs market

Performance by building and market

Contribution to direct booking growth



Compensation



Salary: $1,200 – $1,800 USD/month (depending on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to revenue growth



Why Join Us



Fast-growing international company

High-impact role with real ownership

Opportunity to scale and grow into a senior leadership position

Work directly with executive team



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your CV

A short summary of your experience with PriceLabs and STR revenue management

Examples of results you’ve achieved (if available)



We are looking for someone who thinks like a business owner, not just an operator.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller & Lead Qualifier (US Market) - Full-Time Remote
description:
Job Title: Real Estate Cold Caller & Lead Qualifier (US Market) - Full-Time Remote

Company: Mission Valley Home Buyers

Salary: $4.00 USD/hour

Training Pay: Each 1-hour training session is paid at $5.00 USD.

Hours: Full-Time, 40 hours per week, Monday-Friday.



Job Description:

We are a rapidly growing US-based real estate investment company specializing in residential wholesaling, seeking a highly motivated and fluent English-speaking Cold Caller & Lead Qualifier. This is a full-time, remote position for a dedicated professional based anywhere in the world.

Your Role: You will be the first point of contact for our business, making high-volume outbound calls to property owners across the US. Your primary goal is to engage them in conversation, understand their motivations to sell, effectively qualify leads, and set appointments for our acquisitions team. Our calling window is between 8 AM and 8 PM Eastern Time (ET); you will not call for 12 hours straight, this is simply the range of possible availability for your assigned shifts. Exact calling hours will be assigned at the completion of your training.

Schedule: You will work 40 hours per week, Monday through Friday. Please note, occasional Saturdays may be required depending on scheduling needs and workload.



Key Requirements:

Fluent English communication skills (spoken and written) for US market calls.

Proven experience in outbound calling, telemarketing, or sales.

Reliable computer, stable high-speed internet, and a high-quality noise-canceling headset.

Dedicated, quiet home office environment.

Ability to work consistent US Eastern Time (ET) hours within the 8 AM - 8 PM ET window.

Self-motivated, disciplined, and excellent with CRM data entry.

What We Offer:

Competitive base pay of $4.00 USD per hour.

Paid training: Each 1-hour training session is compensated at $5.00 USD. There are 3-4 training sessions total.

Long-term, stable remote work opportunity.

Supportive team, ongoing training, and growth potential.

title: Dropshipping Creative Video Editor for E-Commerce Brand (AI Skills Preferred)
description:
Summary:



We are looking for a creative and performance driven Video Editor who can produce engaging marketing videos that help generate sales for our e commerce brand.



Our products focus on compact and travel friendly hair styling tools designed for modern lifestyles. Your role will be to transform raw footage, user generated content, and AI generated assets into high performing video creatives that capture attention and encourage customers to purchase.



The ideal candidate understands how video creatives influence customer behavior on platforms such as
, Instagram, and TikTok. You will work closely with our marketing team to create short form videos that highlight product benefits, demonstrate real usage, and drive measurable revenue through advertising campaigns.



If you enjoy combining creativity with performance marketing and understand how video content converts viewers into buyers, we would love to see your portfolio.



How Your Work Generates Revenue



Your video creatives will directly contribute to revenue generation through:



Product demonstration videos that show how the tools are used.



Before and after styling transformations that highlight visible results.



Lifestyle videos showing travel convenience and everyday usability.



UGC style testimonials that build trust with new customers.



Short form ads optimized for Meta and TikTok conversions.



Key Responsibilities

Video Creative Production

Edit engaging short form video creatives used for paid advertising, social media campaigns, and product promotions.



Product Demonstration Content

Produce videos that clearly demonstrate the benefits, features, and convenience of our hair styling tools.



UGC and AI Based Content

Work with user generated content, influencer clips, and AI generated assets to create authentic marketing creatives.



Visual Enhancements

Add captions, motion graphics, transitions, and overlays that improve storytelling and viewer retention.



AI Voice Integration

Create and integrate AI voice overs when needed to enhance video narratives.



Creative Research

Monitor current advertising trends and viral product videos to continuously improve creative performance.



Performance Optimization

Edit video creatives with the goal of improving engagement, click through rates, and conversions.



Requirements

Experience editing videos for advertising, e commerce, or social media brands.



A strong portfolio demonstrating product focused video creatives.



Proficiency in editing tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or CapCut.



Understanding of short form video content optimized for Meta, Instagram, and TikTok.



Ability to produce engaging, fast paced creatives designed to capture attention within the first few seconds.



Basic knowledge of graphic design tools such as Photoshop or Illustrator is an advantage.



Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with marketing teams.



Attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects.



AI Skills



Applicants should have experience using AI tools for video production such as:



AI voice generation tools

AI UGC or avatar creation platforms

AI assisted editing tools

AI based script generation tools



Work Setup

Work from home



Expected Output

The expected production 2 quality video creatives per day.



Compensation

$350 Fix Rate per month + Bonuses

title: Shopify Developer and Marketing
description:
Job Title: Shopify Store Developer & Digital Marketing Specialist



Overview:

We are looking for a skilled and results-driven Shopify expert to build, optimize, and grow our online store. This role combines technical Shopify development with strategic marketing to drive traffic, increase conversions, and boost overall sales.



Key Responsibilities:



Shopify Store Development



Design, build, and launch a fully functional Shopify store

Customize themes to align with brand identity and user experience

Upload and organize products, collections, and content

Optimize site performance, speed, and mobile responsiveness

Set up payment gateways, shipping options, and essential integrations



Sales & Conversion Optimization



Implement strategies to increase conversion rates and average order value

Optimize product pages with compelling descriptions, images, and SEO

Set up upsells, bundles, and promotional offers

Monitor analytics and adjust strategies based on performance



Digital Marketing & Traffic Generation



Develop and execute marketing strategies to drive traffic to the store

Manage and grow social media accounts (Instagram,
, TikTok, etc.)

Create and schedule engaging content aligned with brand messaging

Run and manage paid ads (Meta, Google, TikTok)

Build and manage
 marketing campaigns (flows, newsletters, promotions)



Analytics & Reporting



Track key performance metrics (traffic, conversions, ROI)

Provide regular reports and actionable insights

Continuously test and improve marketing strategies



Qualifications:



Proven experience building and managing Shopify stores

Strong understanding of e-commerce best practices

Experience with social media marketing and paid advertising

Knowledge of SEO,
 marketing, and conversion optimization

Creative mindset with strong attention to detail

Ability to work independently and deliver results



Preferred:



Experience in health, wellness, or lifestyle brands

Familiarity with content creation (graphics, short-form video, etc.)

Knowledge of automation tools and CRM systems



Compensation:



$4/hourly, project-based, or performance-based compensation

Bonus opportunities based on sales growth and results



Ideal Candidate:

You are both creative and analytical, able to build a beautiful online store and also drive real sales. You understand customer behavior, know how to attract the right audience, and can turn visitors into loyal buyers.

title: Medical professional
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented Medical Professional (Physician or highly experienced Nurse) to join our team as a New Patient Coordinator. This role is critical in ensuring our clinical workflow runs smoothly by preparing patient charts and managing the initial intake process.



Key Responsibilities:



Medical Record Review: Thoroughly review incoming patient records, history, and lab results 2–3 days prior to scheduled appointments.



Chart Updating: Summarize key findings and update our EMR system to ensure the treating physician has the most current information ready.



Patient Coordination: Act as the first point of contact for new patients, explaining our process and gathering necessary documentation. Will  also update the charts with the necessary information closer to the appointment. 



Appointment Scheduling: Manage the calendar to book and confirm appointments for new patients.



Data Integrity: Ensure all patient information is handled with the highest level of confidentiality and accuracy.



Requirements 



Medical Degree  or equivalent clinical experience.. May be considered depending on experience 



Previous experience with EMR/EHR systems.



Excellent written and spoken English.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to work independently.



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace.

title: AMAZON KDP VA (Book Research, Creation & Publishing - Full Process)
description:
Hi,

I’m looking for an experienced Amazon KDP VA who can handle the full book creation process from A–Z.

This is not just design or uploading — I need someone who understands how to research profitable niches, create high-quality books, and optimise listings for sales.



???? ROLE OVERVIEW:

You will be responsible for:

- Finding profitable book niches and topics

- Researching best-selling books and trends

- Creating:

  - Book titles

  - Subtitles

  - Outlines

- Producing:

  - Interior content (low-content / medium-content / basic full content depending on project)

  - High-quality covers (or guiding design)

- Keyword research and optimisation



### ???? WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR:

- Proven experience with Amazon KDP if any

- Ability to identify winning niches (not saturated, real demand)

- Understanding of:

  - Keywords

  - Categories

  - Competition analysis

- Strong attention to detail and quality

- Ability to create books that actually sell, not just random uploads



???? STRATEGY FOCUS:

- Quality over quantity  

- Data-driven decisions (not guessing)  

- Scalable ideas (series potential)  



???? AVOID:

- Copyrighted or plagiarised content  

- Low-effort / spam books  

- Poor design or formatting  

- Random niches with no demand  



???? TRIAL TASK:

We will start with a small trial:

- Research and present:

  - 2–3 book ideas

  - Include niche analysis, competition, and keyword ideas

If approved, you will proceed to create 1 full book.



???? PAY:

- Trial: (to be discussed)

- Ongoing: Per book OR hourly

- Opportunity for long-term consistent work



Please include:

1. Your KDP experience (what you’ve done)if any

2. Examples of books you’ve created or worked on (if have in past)

3. Your process for finding profitable niches

4. Tools you use (if any)

5. How you ensure books actually sell



I’m looking for someone reliable who understands KDP properly and can help build a scalable book portfolio, not just upload random content.

Thanks.

title: Medical Biller & Coder (US Healthcare) – Part-Time | Remote (Philippines)
description:
Employment Type: Part-Time

Compensation: $8/hour (starting rate)



About Us

AI-powered revenue cycle management (RCM) platform focused on optimizing medical billing, coding accuracy, and claim submission workflows for healthcare providers, laboratories, and hospitals in the United States. We are building intelligent systems that streamline operations, reduce denials, and accelerate reimbursements.



Role Overview

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and technically proficient Medical Biller & Coder with hands-on experience in US healthcare revenue cycle management. The ideal candidate has strong knowledge of coding standards, payer requirements, and end-to-end claims processing.

You will play a critical role in ensuring accurate coding, clean claim submissions, and efficient reimbursement cycles.



Key Responsibilities

Perform accurate medical coding using ICD-10-CM, CPT, and HCPCS Level II

Manage end-to-end Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) processes:

Charge entry

Claim submission (electronic/paper)

Payment posting

Denial management and appeals

Review and scrub claims to ensure compliance with payer guidelines

Identify and resolve billing discrepancies and coding errors

Work with clearinghouses and payer portals to track claim status

Ensure compliance with HIPAA and US healthcare regulations

Collaborate with internal teams to improve claim acceptance rates and reduce AR days



Required Qualifications

Minimum 2 years of experience in US medical billing and coding

Strong working knowledge of:

ICD-10, CPT, HCPCS coding systems

US insurance payers (Medicare, Medicaid, Commercial)

EOBs, ERA, and denial codes

Experience with RCM workflows and billing software/EMR systems

Familiarity with clearinghouses (e.g., Change Healthcare, Availity, Office Ally)

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with labs, clinics, or hospital billing

Prior exposure to AI-assisted billing tools or automation platforms

Certification (CPC, CCS, or equivalent) is a plus



Application Requirements (Important)

To be considered, applicants must submit a tailored cover letter that includes:

A summary of your relevant experience in US medical billing and coding

Specific examples of your work in RCM processes (e.g., claim submission, denial management)

The types of providers or specialties you have worked with

Any experience improving claim acceptance rates or reducing denials

Familiarity with billing systems, clearinghouses, or tools

?? Applications without a customized and role-specific cover letter will not be considered.

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus 



Apply here:

title: Expert US Executive Assistant to the CEO (50 hours a week)
description:
About the Role

The Executive Assistant to the CEO serves as the operational backbone of Parity's strategic projects and organizational systems. You will build project timelines, track deliverables, manage cross-team communication, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. The right person is detail-oriented, solutions-focused, and energized by helping teams turn vision into execution.



Key Responsibilities

Cross-Team Coordination



Coordinate and document strategic meetings, identifying next steps and responsible parties.

Manage projects using ClickUp and maintain accountability across teams.

Track deliverables, dependencies, and timelines across multiple initiatives.

Proactively flag delays, identify solutions, and adjust schedules as needed.

Maintain a central project calendar to ensure visibility of all major deadlines.

Administrative Support



Maintain and optimize the CEO's calendar, prioritizing key meetings and deadlines.

Coordinate internal and external meetings across multiple time zones.

Send reminders, prepare meeting briefs, and manage scheduling conflicts.

Monitor and organize the executive's inbox, drafting and sending professional communications.

Filter and prioritize messages to keep focus on strategic initiatives.

Written and Internal Communications



Draft and edit polished, brand-aligned written content such as
s, newsletters, blog posts, and internal memos.

Create client-facing materials including announcements, templates, and onboarding documents.

Maintain SOPs, team handbooks, and process documentation.

Travel and Event Coordination



Plan and manage travel logistics, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation.

Prepare detailed itineraries and oversee travel budgets.

Organize virtual or in-person events, conferences, and client meetings.

Systems and Process Management



Support implementation and optimization of communication and documentation tools.

Identify process improvements and lead automation initiatives.

Create internal reports and dashboards to track KPIs and organizational impact.

Support evaluation and reporting of grant deliverables and partner-funded projects.



Qualifications

Minimum 3 years of experience as an Executive Assistant supporting senior leadership or a CEO.

Background in mass communication, media, or content writing preferred.

At least 2 years of experience working remotely in the Eastern Time Zone.

Exceptional organizational, time management, and multitasking skills.

Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with ClickUp, Microsoft Workspace, Zoom, and cloud-based file systems.

Strong initiative and independence in managing competing priorities.

Experience supporting virtual teams in a fully remote environment.

Role Information

Fully remote position

Approximate 50-hour work week



Schedule:  EST

Compensation: $1300 USD

title: Customer Experience Representative
description:
Job Title: Customer Experience Representative

Rate: $3 up to $5/hour  (based on experience)

Schedule: Must be available to work during the US (PST) time zone. 30 to 40 hours per week



We are seeking a Customer Experience Representative to join our dynamic team! This role is ideal for someone who excels at communication, learns quickly, and thrives in a fast-paced, customer-focused environment.



Challenge:

-As part of your application, please create a 60-second video or audio answering the following scenario:

"How would you defuse a disgruntled customer whose Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA) was late?"

-Your response should clearly describe your approach to handling the situation.

-Please do not exceed one minute, and do not include any personal or work experiences in your answer.



Requirements:

-Send a picture of your computer specs.

-Ability to work with a dual-monitor setup.



Preferred Qualifications:

-1-2 years of experience in a BPO environment is an advantage.



How to Apply:

-Send your resume, the required video/audio, and your computer specs.

-Include the answer to this question in the
 subject line: What color do you get when you combine red and yellow?



Note: Only applicants who follow these instructions will be considered. Join us and grow your career with our amazing team!

title: Virtual Assistant – Client Projects & Web QA
description:
Virtual Assistant – Client Projects & Web QA



Remote · Full-time or Part-time Retainer

$1,200–$1,800/mo USD (approx. ?71,650–?107,475/mo) depending on experience

UK business hours (9am–5:30pm GMT/BST), Monday to Friday

Start: ASAP



About Vovi Studio:

Vovi Studio is a design-led web studio delivering high-quality websites and digital experiences for clients worldwide. We're a small, close-knit team who care about great craft, clear communication, and reliable delivery.

As we grow our retainer client base, we're looking for a sharp, detail-oriented VA to support our Project Manager and wider team — helping keep the day-to-day running smoothly so we can focus on delivering great work.



The Role:

This is a varied, hands-on support role sitting closely alongside our Project Managers. You'll be the person who keeps the detail work moving — drafting
s, loading content, briefing developers, proofreading copy, and QA-ing websites — so that everything gets done to a high standard and nothing slips through the cracks.



If you're a natural organiser who's comfortable in a digital environment and takes pride in doing things properly — this role is for you.



What You'll Do:

 Drafting & Inbox Support

Monitor and triage inboxes for two tea
mbers daily

Identify what can be handled, deferred, or flagged for attention

Draft clear, on-brand
 responses ready for review and sending

Keep inboxes organised and highlight anything time-sensitive

Proofreading & Copy Checking

Proofread documents, proposals, web copy, and client-facing materials before they go out

Check for spelling, grammar, tone, and consistency

Suggest improvements where copy could be clearer or more professional



Website QA:

Review Webflow and/or WordPress websites (desktop and mobile) against Figma designs and briefs from the creative team

Write clear, actionable bug reports and improvement notes for developers

Use Loom or screenshots to document visual issues

Re-test fixes and confirm when issues are resolved

Maintain a QA checklist for consistent testing across projects and manage projects through the development cycle



Dev Briefing & Content Loading:

Receive incoming tasks such as content updates and site changes

Brief developers clearly with all context, copy, and assets needed

Load content into Webflow or WordPress as required

Track task progress and follow up to ensure completion



What We're Looking For:



Must-haves:

2–4 years experience in a VA, digital support, or web agency role

Excellent written English — clear, concise, and professional

Confident drafting
s and communications on behalf of others with discretion

Strong proofreading skills — you notice the details others miss

Able to read Figma files to compare designs against live builds

Experience writing bug reports, QA notes, or dev briefs

Reliable, self-directed, and comfortable working async across time zones



Nice to haves:

Familiar with project tools like Notion, Asana, or Slack

Comfortable working inside Webflow and/or WordPress

Experience with staging environments (e.g. Webflow staging)

Comfortable recording Loom walkthroughs of issues

Has supported a retainer or studio environment before



Why Work With Us:

Stable retainer — not project-to-project

Fully remote, flexible setup

Small team, direct communication — no corporate layers

Work with well-designed, quality web projects

Competitive USD rate with room to grow as the role develops



How to Apply:

No lengthy cover letters needed. Just send us:

A short intro — who you are and what you've been working on recently

Examples of your work — QA notes, bug reports,
 drafts, or proofreading samples (screenshots or docs are fine)

Your availability and preferred monthly rate in USD



Your application is our first look at how you communicate — so keep it clear, direct, and to the point. That's exactly how we like to work.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Landing Page Builder (Unbounce / Divi)
description:
Landing Page Builder (Unbounce / Divi)



Remote | Full-Time or Part-Time



We are a UK-based lead generation company looking for a skilled Funnel Builder to turn proven marketing copy into clean, high-converting landing pages.



This is a build-focused role only — you will NOT be responsible for advertising, copywriting, or strategy.



What You’ll Do



Build landing pages using tools such as Unbounce, Divi (WordPress), or similar builders



Take provided copy and structure it into a clear, bold, high-converting layout



Create:

Landing pages

Contact/lead forms

Thank-you pages

Ensure pages are mobile responsive and fast loading

Set up basic conversion tracking (form submissions, thank-you page views, etc.)



What We’re Looking For:



Strong experience with page builders (Unbounce, Divi or similar)

Good design sense - able to make pages look clean, modern and easy to read

Ability to interpret copy and emphasise:

- Headlines

- Key benefits

- Calls to action

Comfortable setting up forms and tracking

Reliable, fast turnaround, and good written communication



Important:



This role is execution-focused.



You will be given:



The copy

The direction



Your job is to build it properly and make it look good.



To Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, include the word “BUILDER” at the top of your application and send:



2–3 examples of landing pages you have personally built

A short explanation of what platform you used

How long it typically takes you to build a simple landing page (landing + thank you page)



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored.



Notes:

Ongoing work available for the right person

We value speed, reliability, and clean execution over creativity



At the end of your application, include the name of your favourite colour.

 marketing and follow ups

title: Real Estate Video Editor
description:
Real Estate Video Editor (Final Cut Pro) – Remote / Freelance / Part-Time



Ascendant Creative Co. is a growing real estate media company in the USA. We create clean, modern, high-end listing videos and short-form content that helps real estate agents market homes at a higher level.



We are looking for a dependable Final Cut Pro video editor to support our team on an as-needed basis. This is primarily an overflow / secondary editor role, meaning project volume may vary depending on workload and seasonality. As the company grows, there is potential for more consistent work over time.



This role is a great fit for someone who has strong instincts for pacing, music, clean audio, and premium-looking real estate edits, and who can consistently deliver polished work on deadline.



What You’ll Be Editing



Most projects will include:

Property Reels (vertical social media listing reels)

Agent Property Reels (vertical agent on-camera reels with b-roll)

Horizontal Property Videos (for YouTube, websites, and listings)

Agent Branding Reels



Turnaround Expectations



We work on fast timelines, so reliability is very important.

Typical turnaround times:

Property Video Projects: 1 to 2 days

Agent Reels: 2 to 3 days

Most projects will also require at least one round of revisions before final delivery.



Responsibilities



Edit 4K footage in Final Cut Pro

Sync video and audio, including multicam footage when needed

Build selects, assemble edits, and tighten pacing

Apply basic color correction and consistent finishing

Use provided LUTs and style direction when needed

Clean up and level audio so everything sounds polished and professional

Add music that fits the tone and pacing of the project

Create clean, professional captions, especially for agent on-camera reels

Export in the correct formats for vertical and horizontal delivery

Keep projects organized for easy revisions using clean folders, timelines, and naming

Receive feedback well and turn revision requests around quickly

Communicate early if anything is behind schedule



You’re a Great Fit If You



Are highly skilled in Final Cut Pro

Have a Mac capable of handling 4K workflows

Have strong pacing and music instincts

Can make edits feel intentional, polished, and premium

Consistently hit deadlines

Communicate clearly and professionally

Pay close attention to details like stabilization, crop consistency, transitions, text timing, and audio quality

Can follow a defined brand style and stay consistent across projects

Have fast and reliable internet



Bonus Points



Experience editing real estate or architecture content

Confidence editing agent on-camera videos

Strong understanding of dialogue pacing and caption timing

Familiarity with LUT workflows and mixed footage from mirrorless cameras and drones

Hours / Workload

Freelance / part-time / contract

Work is assigned on an as-needed basis

Hours will vary depending on project volume

This role may start with light or inconsistent workload, with potential for more consistent work over time



Compensation



Compensation is per project and typically ranges from $40 USD to $125 USD, depending on the type and complexity of the video



How To Apply



Please send the following through OnlineJobs.ph:

2 to 4 real estate specific editing samples

Your Mac specs

Please include your computer model, processor, RAM, and Final Cut Pro version

Your weekly availability

Include your usual working hours and time zone

A short introduction

Tell us about yourself, your editing experience, and why this role is a good fit for you

Please start your application with the word ‘USA’ so we know you read the full job description



Finalists will be asked to complete a short paid test edit.



Job Type: Freelance / Part-time / Contract

Location: Remote

title: Permitting Specialist
description:
Focus: Navigating Lee/Collier County portals, ServiceTitan project tracking, and municipality follow-ups.



Job Overview:

We are looking for a highly organized Permitting Specialist to handle the "paperwork" that keeps our trucks on the road. You will be responsible for preparing, submitting, and tracking all building permits for our plumbing, cooling, and electrical projects across SWFL. If you have experience with Florida building departments and love a "zero-error" environment, you’ll fit right in.



Daily Expectations:



- Prepare and submit permit applications through municipal portals (Lee County eConnect, Fort Myers Beach IWorQ, Collier County, etc.).

- Track permit status daily within ServiceTitan and update the "Projects" tab for the team.

- Coordinate with homeowners to obtain necessary signatures or Notary documents.

- Schedule inspections once jobs are completed and ensure "Passed" results are recorded.

- Resolve any "corrections" or rejections from the city/county promptly to avoid job delays.



Preferred Skills & Experience:



- Must have ServiceTitan experience (specifically using the Projects or Forms features).

- Previous experience with Florida Permitting is a huge plus (understanding NOAs, Termite certificates, etc.).

- Exceptional attention to detail; you must be comfortable reading technical job descriptions.

- Ability to multitask across multiple different city/county websites and portals.

- Strong follow-up skills—you don't wait for the city to call you; you call them.

 Groups, "selling" the Nerd culture to pros who are currently working elsewhere.

- Screen resumes and conduct initial phone interviews to vet for cultural fit and technical basic knowledge.

- Coordinate in-person interviews between candidates and our local management team.

- Manage the "Applicant Tracking System" to ensure no lead goes cold.

- Build a "pipeline" of talent so we have candidates ready when a position opens.

- Proficiency with Indeed, LinkedIn Recruiter, and social media sourcing.

- Excellent English communication skills with a persuasive, professional personality.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Partnerships, Outreach & UGC Coordinator
description:
About Us

Kiseau is a small-batch natural-fiber apparel brand built around wellness, sustainability, and conscious living. We're growing our brand presence through meaningful partnerships — influencers, UGC creators, wholesale retailers, and media — and we need someone to drive that growth.



About the Role

This is a results-driven role tied directly to revenue. You'll be researching, reaching out to, and managing relationships with UGC creators, micro-influencers, brand partners, and retail opportunities across North America. You'll own the pipeline from first contact to confirmed partnership — and you'll be measured on outcomes, not just activity.

If you're proactive, relationship-oriented, and excited about being rewarded for results, this role is for you.

What You'll Do



Research and identify UGC creators, micro-influencers, and brand collaborators aligned with Kiseau's values

Identify wholesale and retail opportunities, stockists, and boutiques across North America



Send outreach
s, follow up consistently, and manage conversations through to confirmed partnerships

Coordinate UGC creator briefs, deadlines, and content approvals

Research media outlets, gift guides, and PR opportunities for product launches

Track all contacts and pipeline activity in a shared CRM (Notion or Google Sheets)

Deliver a short monthly summary of trade show, retail, and distribution opportunities



Hours & Pay



~5 hours/week

$250–300/month depending on experience

Performance bonuses tied to revenue milestones



Tools We Use

Google Suite, Notion or Google Sheets, Instagram, TikTok,



You're a Great Fit If You



Have strong written English and a warm, professional outreach style

Have experience in influencer outreach, UGC coordination, PR, or brand partnerships

Are proactive — you follow up without being reminded

Are comfortable being measured on revenue outcomes

Have a genuine interest in sustainable fashion, wellness, or conscious living

Are reliable and consistent with CRM and tracker upkeep



To Apply please include:



A short intro (3–5 sentences) about your experience with outreach, partnerships, or UGC coordination

One example of a partnership, collaboration, or outreach campaign you managed — what was the outcome?

Confirmation you're comfortable being measured on revenue results



Applications without these will not be reviewed.

title: Shortform Editor - Meta Ads
description:
About CONKA:

CONKA is a brain-performance company on a mission to advance human potential. Born from a first-hand experience with the cognitive toll of repeated concussions, CONKA was founded by Humphrey Bodington and Harry Glover — two former rugby players who identified a glaring gap: physical performance gets all the attention, while brain performance gets none.

CONKA is built to change that.

At its core, CONKA is a daily brain-performance system — not a supplement, not a nootropic pill, not a quick fix. The system combines functional liquid shots (CONKA Flow & CONKA Clear), a cognition-tracking mobile app, and an ongoing commitment to scientific research and trials. Every element is built around one philosophy: small, consistent daily inputs lead to measurable cognitive improvements that compound over time.





The Role:

As a Video Editor at CONKA, you'll work directly within our content pipeline — cutting and assembling raw footage from UGC creators and our Founders into polished Meta Ads. Every edit comes with a creative brief from our team, giving you clear direction on objective, format, and feel. Once delivered, CONKA reviews your edit and provides structured feedback. Your job is to take that input and produce work that's ready to run.

This is a per-task role — you get paid for every edit you successfully deliver. The more you take on, the more you earn. Compensation per task is TBC and will be confirmed during onboarding.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Editing raw UGC and Founder footage into Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) using provided creative briefs

- Producing content that reflects CONKA's positioning — clean, confident, research-led, and human

- Incorporating CONKA review feedback and delivering revisions promptly

- Maintaining consistent quality and fast turnaround across your task queue





What We're Looking For:

- Solid video editing skills

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro

- A strong instinct for short-form content — pacing, hooks, captions, and what makes someone stop scrolling

- An understanding of Meta ad formats and best practices

- The ability to follow a creative brief closely and act on feedback without losing momentum

- A portfolio or showreel of previous edits — short-form or social content preferred





How It Works

1. Apply — Submit your application with a short intro and a link to your portfolio or previous work

2. Trial Task — Shortlisted applicants will be given a trial edit to complete — raw footage, a brief, and a deadline

3. Review — CONKA evaluates your edit against our quality standards

4. Onboarding — Pass the trial and you're in. We'll get you briefed, set up, and ready to go





Perks & Incentives

We believe in rewarding people who show up and perform consistently. Editors who hit and exceed quality KPIs will unlock performance bonuses — additional monetary rewards on top of per-task pay. The better your work, the more you earn.

title: Civil Engineer / Quantity Surveyor - (Commercial & Residential | Buildsoft | Remote
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Quantity Surveyor/Office Engineer to join our dynamic team. This multifaceted role combines quantity surveying expertise with office engineering and financial administration, focusing on accurate cost estimation, project budgeting, and comprehensive project support. The successful candidate will work closely with our project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure precise cost control and seamless project delivery from concept to completion.



Key Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Quantity Surveying



Project Estimating: Calculate materials, labor costs, and overall project budgets with precision

BOQ & BOM Preparation: Develop comprehensive Bills of Quantities and Bills of Materials for all projects

Job Pricing: Analyze construction plans and prepare detailed quantity requirements and pricing structures

Contract Analysis: Scrutinize maintenance costs, material expenses, and contracts to secure optimal deals

Tender Management: Analyze tenders and manage procurement processes for construction and design projects

Prepare accurate brickwork and blockwork quantity take-offs, including bricks, blocks, mortar, lintels, insulation, and related masonry components

Analyze brickwork labor and material rates to ensure competitive and accurate pricing

Estimating Tools: Utilize software including Simpro, JobTread, Bluebeam, PlanSwift, CostX, Measure Square, Stone Pro, and Microsoft Office to support estimating, budgeting, and project documentation.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Stakeholder Liaison: Coordinate with site managers, clients, contractors, and subcontractors to ensure smooth project execution

Reporting: Prepare comprehensive reports, analyses, contracts, budgets, and risk assessments

Strategic Advisory: Advise managers and clients on cost improvements, new strategies, and savings opportunities

Change Management: Document design changes and update budgets accordingly

Material Management: Track materials inventory and coordinate ordering when required



Financial Administration & Office Support



Invoice Management: Handle invoicing processes and perform data entry for financial documentation

Administrative Support: Assist staff accountants and handle various office and financial tasks

Client Administration: Manage administrative tasks delegated by clients with efficiency and accuracy



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Quantity Surveying: Proven experience in cost estimation, BOQ preparation, and quantity surveying methodologies

Construction Knowledge: Strong understanding of construction processes, materials, and industry standards

Financial Acumen: Experience with budget management, financial reporting, and cost control

Contract Management: Knowledge of construction contracts, procurement, and tender analysis

Simpro Experience: Hands-on experience using Simpro for job costing, project budgeting, invoicing, and workflow management



Professional Skills



Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities with exceptional attention to detail

Software Proficiency: Competency in quantity surveying software, spreadsheet applications, and financial systems

Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills for client and contractor liaison

Organization: Outstanding organizational skills with ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

Adaptability: Flexibility to handle diverse administrative and technical tasks



What We Offer



Competitive salary package

Opportunity to work with self-builders across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training opportunities

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Career growth potential within an expanding company

Involvement in diverse construction and visualization projects

Remote working flexibility with comprehensive project support systems

Experience working on international projects with diverse clients.



Application Instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: AI Creative / Art Director - Remote
description:
Please follow the application instructions below



About the Role



We’re looking for a forward-thinking Art Director who can transform complex ideas into compelling visual stories. This role combines creative direction, visual storytelling, and AI-powered design, driving high-impact campaigns across film, digital, and social platforms.



You’ll lead the creative vision from concept to execution—ensuring all outputs are visually engaging, strategically aligned, and culturally relevant.



What You’ll Be Doing



Translate Ideas into Visual Concepts



Turn complex technical, scientific, or product ideas into clear and engaging visual narratives

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to bring concepts to life through design and storytelling



Develop Creative Campaigns



Lead the development of big-picture creative concepts for films, social media, and product launches

Create cohesive visual directions that align with brand identity and campaign goals

Contribute to ideation, mood boards, and storyboards



Lead Visual Storytelling



Oversee end-to-end visual execution across video, animation, and digital content

Ensure consistency in style, tone, and storytelling from concept to final output

Guide designers, editors, and creatives to deliver high-quality work



On-Set & Production Direction



Provide creative direction during live-action shoots and motion graphics production

Ensure all visuals align with brand standards and creative strategy

Collaborate closely with production teams to execute the vision



Use AI for Design & Prototyping



Leverage AI tools such as Midjourney, DALL·E, Adobe Firefly, Runway, and similar platforms

Rapidly prototype concepts and accelerate creative workflows

Explore new AI-driven approaches to enhance visual output



Ensure Strategic & Cultural Relevance

Ensure content resonates with target audiences across platforms



What We’re Looking For



Creative & Design Expertise



Strong portfolio demonstrating art direction, visual storytelling, and campaign work

Excellent understanding of composition, typography, colour, and design principles

Experience in film, animation, or digital content production



Tools & Technology



Proficiency in design and creative tools (Adobe Creative Suite or similar)

Mindset



Creative thinker with a passion for innovation and experimentation

Ability to balance creative vision with strategic objectives

Self-motivated and adaptable in a fast-paced environment



Why This Role is Unique



This role is ideal for someone who can blend creativity, strategy, and emerging AI tools—leading the next generation of visual storytelling and creative production.
