title: Full-stack Developer - AI Sales Coach Platfrom
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About the Role



We're building a standalone AI-powered Sales Coaching Platform that analyzes sales conversations across multiple channels 
, SMS, phone, video calls) and provides real-time, actionable coaching to sales reps and managers.

A working prototype exists as a Vue.js component. Your job is to transform this into a full-featured SaaS product with dashboards, automated triggers, historical analytics, and team management.



Key Responsibilities



Architect and build a standalone AI Sales Coach application from existing prototype

Design backend services for conversation ingestion, AI analysis, and reporting

Build manager/rep dashboards with performance metrics and trends

Optimize AI prompts and scoring algorithms for sales conversation analysis

Integrate with GoHighLevel, Google Meet, Recall.ai and Twilio



Required Skills

Must-Have:



Vue.js (2 or 3) or React, TypeScript, state management (Vuex/Pinia/Redux)

Node.js/Express or Laravel/PHP, RESTful API design

PostgreSQL or MySQL, query optimization

GitHub Copilot and/or Claude for AI-assisted development workflows

OpenAI/Claude API integration, prompt engineering

GCP or AWS (Cloud Functions, PubSub, Cloud Run)

OAuth 2.0, webhook handling, third-party API consumption



Strongly Preferred:



Experience with conversation analytics or speech-to-text systems

Background in sales tech (CRM, sales engagement platforms)

Queue/job processing (Redis, RabbitMQ)

Real-time systems (WebSockets)

CI/CD pipelines, Docker



Nice-to-Have:



GoHighLevel API experience

Video/audio transcription services (AssemblyAI, Deepgram)



Technical Environment



Frontend: Vue.js 2.6, Vuetify 2

Backend: Laravel 9 (PHP), Node.js microservices

Database: MySQL

AI: OpenAI GPT via custom proxy

Cloud: Google Cloud Platform

Integrations: GoHighLevel, Google Workspace

title: Accountant / Bookkeeper - Remote (UK, Ireland, Australia & New Zealand Markets)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Accounting Virtual Assistant to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on comprehensive financial management and accounting support, including UK-specific compliance requirements. The successful candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing accounts payable and receivable, ensuring regulatory compliance, and providing essential financial reporting to support our expanding operations across Ireland and the UK.



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Financial Data Management



Bookkeeping: Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records for all business transactions

Data Entry: Process and record financial data with precision and attention to detail

Invoice Management: Handle invoicing processes and payment processing for clients and suppliers

Account Reconciliation: Reconcile bank statements and maintain accurate account balances

Bookkeeping: Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records using accounting software including MYOB



Accounts Management



Accounts Payable: Manage supplier payments, vendor invoices, and payment scheduling

Accounts Receivable: Monitor client payments, follow up on outstanding invoices, and manage debt collection

Cash Flow Management: Track and report on cash flow positions and payment cycles

Credit Control: Implement credit control procedures and manage customer payment terms



UK Compliance & Regulatory Requirements



CIS Compliance: Manage Construction Industry Scheme (CIS) compliance and monthly reporting

VAT Returns: Prepare and submit VAT returns ensuring full compliance with HMRC requirements

Tax Compliance: Maintain compliance with all UK tax regulations and submission deadlines

HMRC Submissions: Handle various HMRC submissions and correspondence



Payroll & Employment Administration



Payroll Management: Process PAYE (Pay As You Earn) and CIS payroll for employees and subcontractors

Employment Records: Maintain accurate employment records and statutory documentation

Pension Administration: Support workplace pension scheme administration and compliance

Statutory Payments: Calculate and process statutory sick pay, maternity pay, and other employment-related payments



Financial Reporting & Analysis



P&L Preparation: Generate comprehensive Profit & Loss statements and financial reports

Financial Analysis: Provide financial analysis and insights to support business decision-making

Management Reporting: Prepare regular financial reports for management review

Budget Support: Assist with budget preparation and variance analysis



Tax Preparation & Professional Support



Tax Preparation: Prepare and organize documentation for annual tax returns and submissions

Professional Liaison: Work closely with external accountants and tax advisors

Audit Support: Provide documentation and support during audits and financial reviews

Compliance Monitoring: Ensure all financial practices meet regulatory standards



Required Skills & Experience

Essential Qualifications



UK Tax Knowledge: Strong understanding of UK tax system, VAT, CIS, and PAYE regulations

Construction Industry: Experience with construction industry accounting and CIS compliance preferred

Compliance Expertise: Knowledge of HMRC requirements and submission processes

Accounting Software: Proficiency in accounting software (Sage, Xero, QuickBooks, MYOB or similar platforms)



Instructions:

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Operations Assistant (E-commerce / Customer Support Backend)
description:
Overview:

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Operations Assistant to support daily backend operations and help ensure smooth coordination across teams. This role is ideal for someone organized, proactive, and comfortable working with systems, processes, and cross-functional teams.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Daily Operations Support



Assist in managing day-to-day backend operations

Help ensure tasks across teams are completed on time

Monitor workflows and flag any delays or issues



2. Automation & System Support



Assist in monitoring automations (funnels, workflows, backend processes)

Coordinate with the Dev team for fixes or updates when needed

Help maintain accuracy and functionality of systems



3. Data & Task Monitoring



Review data outputs and flag inconsistencies

Help track performance and ensure tasks are properly executed

Support reporting and basic data analysis



4. Fulfillment & Coordination



Assist in coordinating with suppliers and 3PL for shipping and order updates

Follow up on delays or fulfillment concerns

Help ensure smooth communication between teams



5. Customer Support Backend Support



Support the CS team with backend-related tasks

Assist with SOP updates and process improvements

Help manage escalations or internal follow-ups



6. Team Support & Coordination



Work closely with Operations, CS, Dev, and Data teams

Help maintain accountability and organization across tasks

Provide general support wherever needed



7. Payroll & Billing Support



Assist with payroll tracking for tea
mbers

Manage partner invoices and billing coordination

Handle light bookkeeping tasks and ensure records are organized



Requirements:



Experience in e-commerce, operations, customer support, or administrative roles

Strong organizational and multitasking skills

Attention to detail and ability to follow processes

Basic data analysis and reporting skills

Good communication skills

Ability to work independently and stay proactive



Nice to Have:



Familiarity with Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar tools

Experience with automation tools or backend systems

Basic bookkeeping or finance tracking experience

Understanding of SOPs and workflow optimization



What We’re Looking For:

We’re not looking for a typical VA. We need someone dependable, organized, and capable of handling real operational responsibility. This role requires strong ownership, the ability to think critically, follow systems efficiently, and support multiple moving parts without constant supervision. You should be comfortable working across teams, solving problems, and keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes.



Please use this link to apply:

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Executive Assistant to the General Manager — Part-Time (3 hours/day)
description:
Executive Assistant to the General Manager — Part-Time (3 hours/day)

Global headwear brand — Remote (must work 9:00am–12:00p
lbourne / AEST Mon–Fri)

Pay: $120 USD per week (paid weekly)



Be the GM’s morning engine. This is a short, high-impact role for someone who is ruthlessly organised, an excellent writer, and brilliant at turning
s and decisions into completed actions. You’ll own inbox triage, priority-setting, and follow-up so the GM can focus on strategy.



The role — quick and honest

You’ll spend three focused hours every morning owning the GM’s inbox and calendar: collate the day’s top items, run a daily Teams catch-up with the GM to set priorities, send replies on the GM’s behalf, and chase owners until tasks are done. You do not need to attend other meetings — your job is to move things forward, not sit in them.



Key responsibilities:

- Triage the GM’s inbox: identify urgent items, draft and send responses on the GM’s behalf, and escalate when required.

- Run a daily Teams catch-up with the GM (within 9–12) to agree priorities and actions.

- Create clear action lists and maintain a simple TAC (Time Action - Calendar) tracker — chase owners and log updates until completion.

- Protect the GM’s time: manage calendar requests, block strategic time, and categorize meeting requests.

- Draft and send clear, on-brand communications from the GM to the business.

- Hold teams accountable to deadlines across Product, Sourcing, Sales, Customer Service and Finance.

- Maintain strict confidentiality and good judgement.



Must-haves:

- Proven EA or senior admin experience in wholesale / fashion / accessories / footwear.

- Exceptional written English — tidy, decisive, persuasive.

- A process-first mindset: you build simple systems and run them relentlessly.

- Comfortable sending
s on behalf of the GM and escalating professionally.

- Tool fluency: Outlook/Gmail, Teams, Slack, Asana (or similar). Comfortable referencing PLM/ERP notes.

- Availability 9:00am–12:00p
lbourne time, Mon–Fri.

- High integrity and willingness to undergo background checks if required.



Nice-to-haves:

- Experience with SAP, PLM or retail ERPs.

- Practical experience enforcing TAC / deadline compliance.

- Natural cultural champion — someone who makes team comms clear, consistent and on-brand.



What is a TAC (brief)

TAC = Time Action Calendar. It’s the launch timetable with owners, deadlines and dependencies. You’ll keep a short TAC tracker every morning so the GM only sees what truly matters.



Success in the first 90 days

Day 1–30: Daily inbox triage is consistent; morning catch-ups are tight and actionable.

Day 31–90: Deadlines are being hit more often, follow-ups are tracked and closed, and the GM has more uninterrupted strategic time.



Practicals & how to apply

Hours: 3 hours/day (9:00–12:00 Melbourne time).

Pay: $120 USD/week, paid weekly.

Contract: Ongoing (start ASAP / by mutual agreement).

Location: Remote — must work Melbourne hours.



To apply:

- Send a short cover note (2–3 sentences), CV, and a 2–3 bullet example of a process you implemented that improved deadline compliance.

- Confirm you can: work 9–12 Melbourne time, send
s on behalf of the GM, and accept the weekly pay of $120 USD.

- Answer screening questions below:

1. Briefly describe your wholesale/fashion/EA experience.

2. Which tools do you use for inbox triage and task tracking?

3. One example of how you’ve "branded" or improved team communication.



We need an excellent communicator and cultural champion — if you make leadership look better and deadlines happen, apply.

title: Part-Time Executive Assistant / Admin VA
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Executive Assistant / Admin VA

Hours: 4 hours per day, Monday to Friday

Location: Remote (UK working hours between 9am -5pm)

Pay: $400 - $530/month depending on experience



About us:

Kasaeshna is a UK-based AI automation and technology consultancy. We help estate agents and professional services firms automate their operations and grow revenue using compliant automation and AI. We are an 8 year old fast-moving, founder-led business with multiple products and clients across different sectors.



About the role:

You'll be working directly with the director of Business Development. Your job is simple, make sure nothing falls through the cracks. You'll be the person who handles everything that needs doing so the founder can focus entirely on sales calls, client relationships, and business development. Think of yourself as the person who follows the founder around and handles everything behind them.



What you'll be doing:

Managing and organising the founder's inbox, flagging urgent items, drafting responses where possible

Updating CRM and lead trackers after every sales call with notes and next steps

Sending follow-up
s to prospects after calls using pre-written templates

Preparing call briefs, before every sales call you pull together a one-page summary of who the prospect is, their company, what they said on LinkedIn, and any relevant context

Chasing outstanding proposals and following up with warm leads who've gone quiet

Onboarding admin - sending welcome
s, contracts, onboarding docs to new clients

Scheduling and calendar management - booking calls, sending reminders, rescheduling

Building prospect lists for the SDR - researching target companies and compiling into Google Sheets

General admin tasks as they come up - formatting documents, organising files, research tasks



What we're looking for:



Previous EA or admin VA experience working with a founder or small business

Excellent written English — you'll be writing
s on behalf of the director

Extremely organised and proactive — you spot what needs doing without being told

Comfortable working across multiple tools — Gmail, Google Sheets, CRM, Notion or similar

Fast learner who can pick up new systems quickly

Reliable, responsive, and communicates proactively if something is unclear

Available during UK morning or afternoon hours



What makes someone great in this role:

You don't wait to be told. You see something needs doing and you do it. You make the founder's life easier every single day without them having to think about it. You're the kind of person who sends a message saying "I noticed this needed doing so I handled it" rather than waiting to be asked.



To apply:

Send a short voice note or video (2 minutes max) telling us about a time you helped a founder or business owner stay organised and what systems you used to do it. Written applications without this will not be considered.

title: High-End 3D / AI Visualization Expert for Frameless Glass Sliding System (STRICT Accuracy Required)
description:
### Job Title:



High-End 3D / AI Visualization Expert for Frameless Glass Sliding System (STRICT Accuracy Required)



---



### Project Overview:



I am looking for a highly skilled specialist who can create **photorealistic images and animations** of a **frameless glass sliding wall system** used for verandas, garden rooms, and outdoor living spaces.



?? **This is NOT a generic AI image generation job.**

?? **Product accuracy is critical and non-negotiable.**



I already have:



* CAD files (STEP format)

* Real product reference images

* Technical details of all components (rails, profiles, dimensions)



---



### About the Product:



The product is a **high-end frameless sliding glass wall system**, consisting of:



* Multiple glass panels (4–6 panels typical)

* Slim vertical glass connections (minimal framing)

* A **multi-track bottom rail system** (very important detail)

* Aluminum sliding track (visible and functional)

* Top guidance rail

* A handle ONLY on the first sliding panel



?? The system is minimalist and precision-based. Small mistakes are unacceptable.



---



### What I Need:



* Photorealistic renders for website use

* Close-up detail shots (especially bottom rail system)

* Lifestyle scenes (luxury gardens, modern homes, Dutch-style environments)

* Optional: short animations (sliding movement of panels)



---



### VERY IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS (READ CAREFULLY):



? The product MUST remain **100% identical to the CAD design**

? No changes, simplifications, or “AI interpretation” allowed



This means:



* Correct number of panels

* Correct proportions (example: 250cm height / 550cm width)

* Exact bottom rail structure and scale

* Correct aluminum track vs coated parts

* Correct sliding direction (all panels stack on one side)

* Handle only on the first panel



???? If your workflow changes product geometry, this job is NOT for you.



---



### Required Workflow:



You MUST work using:



* My CAD files (STEP ? Blender / 3ds Max / Cinema4D / Unreal Engine etc.)

* Accurate materials (glass, aluminum, coatings)



AI may ONLY be used for:



* Environment creation

* Background styling

* Lighting inspiration



? AI may NOT modify or recreate the product itself



---



### Style Direction:



Target style:



* Warm, luxurious, modern

* Dutch high-end residential environments

* Landscaped gardens (Laren / countryside style)

* Clean, premium, architectural look



---



### Who I Am Looking For:



* Experienced in **3D product visualization**

* Experience with **architectural renders**

* Strong eye for **technical accuracy**

* NOT someone who only uses Midjourney / basic AI tools



---



### To Apply:



Please include:



1. Portfolio (relevant work only – similar level)

2. Explanation of your workflow (VERY important)

3. Confirmation that you understand:

   ? Product must remain EXACT (no AI distortion)

4. Estimated price per image / animation



---



### Important Note:



I have already worked with multiple designers and AI tools that failed due to lack of precision.



???? I am ONLY looking for someone who can deliver **both realism AND technical accuracy**



If you cannot guarantee this, please do not apply.



---



### Long-Term Opportunity:



If the collaboration is successful, this will turn into:



* Ongoing work

* Full website visual package

* Multiple product variations



---



Looking forward to working with a true professional.

title: Paralegal Assistant
description:
Description

About the Role



We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Paralegal Assistant with proven Personal Injury experience to support U.S.-based law firms. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience assisting with pre-litigation and/or litigation personal injury cases, managing case files, communicating with clients and medical providers, and preparing legal documentation under attorney supervision. This role requires strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage deadlines in a fast-paced legal environment.



Key Responsibilities



Case Management & File Organization

Maintain and update personal injury case files (digital and CRM-based)

Organize medical records, bills, accident reports, and insurance documentation

Track statutes of limitations and case deadlines

Manage document naming conventions and file protocols



Document Preparation & Drafting

Draft demand letters, correspondence, and basic pleadings (under supervision)

Prepare settlement packages and medical chronologies

Assist with discovery responses and document production

Draft intake summaries and case status updates



Client & Vendor Communication

Communicate with clients regarding case status and document collection

Follow up with medical providers for records and billing statements

Coordinate with insurance adjusters as instructed

Schedule depositions, medical exams, and consultations



Administrative & Operational Support

Update case management systems (e.g., Clio, MyCase, Filevine, Litify, etc.)

Maintain settlement tracking logs

Assist with lien tracking and resolution coordination

Support billing documentation when needed



Required Qualifications

Minimum 3+ years of experience supporting Personal Injury cases

Experience with pre-litigation and/or litigation support

Strong understanding of:

Demand packages

Medical records and billing summaries

Insurance correspondence

Discovery basics

Proficiency with legal case management systems (e.g., Clio, Filevine, MyCase, Litify, etc.)

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

High attention to detail and organizational ability

Ability to manage multiple cases and deadlines simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with U.S.-based Personal Injury firms



Familiarity with:

Contingency fee case structures

Lien resolution processes

Settlement disbursement procedures

Experience preparing medical chronologies or demand summaries



Core Competencies

Strong time management

Proactive communication

Confidentiality and professionalism

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Problem-solving mindset

title: Media QC & Delivery Specialist
description:
REPORTS TO: Owner

WORK HOURS (Part-Time): 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM EST

This role is currently part-time (4 hours/day), with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position as the company continues to expand.

STARTING PAY while Onboarding: $4/hour

POTENTIAL PAY: $4.25–$4.75/hour after onboarding, based on performance.



SUMMARY

We’re looking for someone smart, organized, and detail-oriented to help manage quality control and delivery of media for our real estate clients. If you take pride in getting the small details right, enjoy structured workflows, and are open to feedback and learning, we’d love to meet you.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with the company, take on more responsibility over time, and become a key part of our day to day operations and client experience.



WHO WE ARE:

Pharos Media LLC is a real estate media company based in the Tampa Bay area. We provide high quality photo and video services for real estate professionals and are known for our fast turnaround, reliable service, and attention to detail.



Our goal is not just to deliver great media, but to support our clients as part of their marketing team. As we continue to grow, we’re looking for people who take pride in their work, care about the client experience, and want to be part of a team that values consistency, trust, and growth.



If you’re looking for a place where your work matters, you’ll be supported, and you can grow over time, this could be a great fit.



JOB SUMMARY:

You will oversee the quality control and delivery of photo and video projects, ensuring all media meets our standards before being delivered to clients. This role involves coordinating with the editing team, managing uploads, and maintaining clear communication with the owner and support staff.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

+Manage and track all active projects to ensure smooth workflow and on-time delivery

+Deliver completed projects before 12 PM EST whenever applicable

+Perform quality control on all deliverables (photos, videos, 2D floor plans, and 3D tours)

+Make minor photo adjustments in Lightroom as needed

+Request and coordinate re-edits with the video editor when necessary

+Maintain clear and consistent communication with the owner and support staff

+Assist with updating and maintaining the company’s CRM during downtime or when deliveries are completed ahead of schedule



SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS:

+Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively

+Strong attention to detail with a focus on accuracy and consistency

+Excellent written and verbal communication in English

+Experience with CRM systems or similar tools

+Proficiency in Adobe Lightroom, Slack, Spiro, Dropbox, and AutoHDR (or similar tools)

+Fast learner with a willingness to take feedback and continuously improve

+Experience with photo or video editing is a strong plus



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:

Apply for the position as normal and submit a short video (2–3 minutes) answering the following questions.
 it to 
 with the subject line of: QC and Media Delivery - Your name. 



+Tell us about yourself. What do you enjoy or love doing?

+Describe your past work experience and how it relates to this role at Pharos Media LLC

+Why do you believe you would be a great fit for this position?

+Do you have any leadership or management experience? If so, please describe

+How do you stay organized and make sure tasks are completed on time?

title: Remote Sales Representative
description:
Remote Sales Representative 




 is an international marketplace that connects Sponsors and Creators for paid promotions through a more structured, professional, and results-focused workflow.



We are setting up a brand new remote sales team and looking for motivated sales representatives who want to grow with the company at an early stage. This role is best suited for someone who is proactive, confident in outreach, comfortable speaking with businesses in English and Tagalog, and serious about building long-term results in a performance-based environment.



What You’ll Do



As a Sales Representative, your main focus will be bringing new Sponsors and Brands onto the Spondise platform and guiding them toward creating their first listing. Later focus can include outreach and onboard Influencers and Creators.



This is a self-driven outreach role. You will be expected to take initiative in finding and approaching potential Sponsors and Brands through social media, online channels, direct research, and other relevant outreach methods. 



Spondise provides product information, positioning guidance, outreach guidance, and ongoing support. However, this is not a rigid script-based role with fixed daily procedures for where, when, and how outreach must be carried out.



Because of this flexibility, the role can suit both part-time and full-time availability. To support team coordination, your preferred working hours should be submitted before the start of each new week so they can be included in the weekly availability schedule.



Your responsibilities include:

- Prospecting and generating leads through your own outreach efforts across online channels, social media,
, LinkedIn, calls, and other approved methods

- Identifying potential Sponsors and Brands through research, observation, networking, and direct prospecting

- Reaching out to prospects to introduce Spondise and explain its value

- Handling cold and warm outreach across multiple channels

- Following up consistently and moving leads through the onboarding process

- Assisting qualified prospects with registration and first-listing setup

- Tracking daily outreach, follow-ups, and sales progress accurately

- Reporting activity and updates through the team’s approved communication and tracking tools

- Participating in training, feedback sessions, and performance reviews

- Representing Spondise professionally in all interactions



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for people who are:

- Highly motivated and target-driven

- Self-driven and comfortable working with a high level of personal responsibility

- Resourceful in finding leads and opening conversations without needing step-by-step instructions

- Comfortable with outreach, follow-up, and sales conversations

- Confident communicating with business owners and decision-makers in English

- Organized, consistent, and disciplined with daily activity

- Willing to learn, improve, and adapt their own approach based on results

- Interested in long-term growth, not just short-term earnings

- Reliable, professional, and responsive during agreed working periods



Preferred Experience



Preferred, but not always required:

- Sales, appointment setting, lead generation, or business development experience

- Cold
, cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, social selling, or B2B sales experience

- Experience working remotely and managing performance independently

- Familiarity with influencer marketing, creator partnerships, digital services, or marketplace businesses



Basic Requirements



To perform well in this role, you should have:

- A stable internet connection

- A computer or laptop suitable for remote work and multitasking

- A headset or microphone with clear audio for calls

- A quiet and professional work environment

- Good written and spoken English and Tagalog

- The ability to track, record, and report your daily activity accurately

- Reliable availability during agreed working hours or team check-in windows



Compensation and Growth



Top performers may unlock:

- Higher commission levels

- Performance bonuses and incentives

- Eligibility for more advanced roles

- Team lead or mentoring responsibilities

- Access to future fixed-pay or hybrid opportunities, where applicable

- Long-term career growth as the company expands



Growth within Spondise is based on performance, consistency, professionalism, and the value you bring to the team.



What We Offer



- Commission-based earning potential with performance incentives

- Increasing base salaries with higher ranks

- Remote work with flexibility and autonomy in execution

- Product guidance, training support, and performance feedback

- Early-stage opportunity to grow with an international company

- A chance to join early, contribute directly, and grow alongside the company

- A performance-focused environment that rewards initiative and results

- A supportive team with regular communication and feedback



How To Apply



1. Send a message through the platform’s PM system and include:

- A short introduction about yourself

- Any relevant sales, outreach, or lead generation experience

- The tools, channels, or methods you have used before for prospecting or selling

- Your level of spoken and written English

- Why you believe you are a strong fit for a self-driven, commission-based sales role

2. You will be invited to our 
 server for an initial interview

3. All further interactions proceed via 
.



We hope to hear from you!

title: Drafter (Residential Interior Design & Design-and-Build)
description:
About Posh Home

Posh Home is an established design-and-build company specialising in high-end residential projects across both apartment and landed property segments. With years of hands-on experience delivering bespoke living spaces, we have built a strong reputation for quality craftsmanship, thoughtful design, and reliable project execution.

Our portfolio spans the full spectrum of residential interior design — from contemporary apartment fit-outs to luxurious landed house transformations. We are particularly well known for our design-and-build capability for landed properties, where we manage every stage of the project from concept to completion, giving our clients a seamless and stress-free experience.

At Posh Home, we handle a wide range of project types including Additions and Alterations (A&A), structural reconstruction, and full rebuilds. This breadth of work means our team is consistently exposed to diverse, technically challenging, and rewarding projects that develop both skill and professional confidence.

We are a company that values precision, creativity, and professionalism. Our designers, drafters, and project managers work closely together in a collaborative environment where every tea
mber's contribution matters. We believe that great spaces are built by great teams, and we are committed to investing in the people who make our projects exceptional.

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented drafter looking to grow your career within a dynamic residential design and build firm, we welcome you to be part of the Posh Home family.



What You’ll Do

-Prepare residential homes and interior layouts options.

-Prepare presentations based on the designer's inspiration and design concepts.

-Support the designer with detailed construction drawings, SketchUp & Autocad drawings.

-Ensure all drawings must be accurate and fully dimensioned. 

-Revise drawings and plans based on designer feedback and project updates.

-Assist designer with material selections, plumbing fixtures and finishes.

-Assist with 3D rendering tasks when applicable (experience preferred but not required).



Minimum Qualifications

-Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering, Architecture, Interior Design, or any related field

-Fresh graduates are welcome to apply; candidates with 1–3 years of relevant experience



Technical Skills & Software Proficiency

-Proficient in AutoCAD (2D drafting is essential; 3D is an advantage)

-Knowledgeable in SketchUp for 3D modelling and spatial visualisation

-Familiarity with Revit or BIM software is an added advantage

-Basic knowledge of Adobe Photoshop or Illustrator for presentation layouts

-Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) for documentation and reporting



Technical Knowledge & Competencies

-Able to read, interpret, and produce architectural and structural drawings accurately

-Knowledgeable in space planning and interior layout design for both apartments and landed houses

-Understanding of building construction methods, materials, and finishes used in residential projects

-Familiar with Additions and Alterations (A&A) works, structural reconstruction, and full rebuild processes

-Able to prepare as-built drawings, shop drawings, and construction documentation

-Familiarity with local building codes, regulations, and submission requirements is an advantage

-Ability to coordinate drawing sets across architectural, structural, mechanical, and electrical (M&E) disciplines

-Understanding of material schedules, finish schedules, and door/window schedules



Soft Skills & Work Attributes

-Strong attention to detail and commitment to drawing accuracy

-Able to work independently as well as collaborate effectively within a team

-Good time management skills with the ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

-Proactive, self-motivated, and willing to learn

-Good communication skills — able to liaise with designers, project managers, and contractors

-Able to work under tight deadlines and adapt to changing project requirements

-A keen eye for design aesthetics and an appreciation for quality residential interiors



Bonus Skills (Advantage)

-Knowledge of AI tools (for design support, rendering, or productivity)

-Proficient in Adobe Photoshop for presentation and editing works

 marketing and can take a campaign from concept to execution, including template design, segmenting lists, and conducting A/B testing to drive conversions.

title: F&B Admin & Marketing Assistant (Sabi Sounds & Bar Selecta)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

At Bar Selecta and Sabi Sounds, we believe hospitality goes beyond what’s served — it’s about how people feel, connect, and come back for more. Our businesses are built around music, culture, and community. From late nights at Bar Selecta to slow mornings at Sabi Sounds, each brand is designed to create moments that feel personal, immersive, and memorable.



We are a small, close-knit team that values collaboration, creativity, and initiative. The way we work is hands-on, fast-paced, and constantly evolving — where ideas are encouraged, and everyone plays a part in shaping the experience. If you enjoy being part of something dynamic, culture-driven, and people-focused, you’ll feel right at home here.



Check out Bar Selecta's and Sabi Sounds' (Melbourne) website





ABOUT THE ROLE

An exciting opportunity to join the Bar Selecta & Sabi Sounds family has emerged!

We are seeking a full-time/part-time Admin & Marketing Assistant to support the day-to-day running of Bar Selecta and Sabi Sounds.



This is a hands-on role combining marketing execution and light administrative support.

You will be responsible for planning and scheduling social media content, as well as creating visuals through photo and video editing. You will work closely with the directors to align on content direction and social media strategy, bringing campaigns to life across Instagram,
, Google Business, and more!



Beyond content, you will support marketing-related tasks such as setting up Eventbrite pages, managing event listings, responding to comments and messages, replying to Google reviews, and assisting with general online engagement. On the administrative side, you will assist with day-to-day operational tasks such as updating POS systems, managing internal apps (e.g. timesheets and membership platforms), running basic reports, and supporting ad-hoc tasks as needed.



You will play a key role in keeping both brands active, organised, and consistently engaging & connected with their audience.



This role is for you if: 

- You are proficient in English (written and verbal) with strong communication skills

- You have at least 1 year of experience in social media or digital marketing (F&B or lifestyle preferred)

- You are tech-savvy and experienced in creating & editing content (photo, video, reels, short-form content) and posting on various social media platforms such as Instagram,
, Google Business, etc.

- You are comfortable using tools like Canva, CapCut, or similar editing software

- You are confident in engaging with audiences by replying to comments, messages, reviews, and general enquiries in a timely and brand-aligned manner

- You have a good eye for aesthetics, trends, and social media storytelling

- You can assist with planning events from concept to execution, from setting up Eventbrite pages to managing registrations and supporting communication with attendees

- You can produce monthly reports with great attention to detail.

- You are comfortable handling light administrative tasks, such as updating POS (Point of Sales) systems, managing apps (e.g. timesheets, membership platforms, etc.), and running basic reports

- You are willing to learn and adapt to different tools, systems, and workflows as required

- You are organised, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks across two brands

- You are creative, active, and able to contribute to rolling out initiatives related to marketing purposes.

- You have a passion for driving impactful digital marketing initiatives and a willingness to work hard in a fast-moving & -accelerated environment.

- You are organised, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks across two brands

- You enjoy hospitality, events, music, and culture-driven environments





REQUIREMENTS

- Must provide applicable/official English Tests (e.g. IELTS/TOEFL) you have taken within the past 2 years

OR Complete the EF English proficiency tests, and upload the test results to the Applicant’s Google form 

- Have at least 1 year of experience in a similar role (marketing, social media, or content-focused)

- Have experience in creating content & crafting articles for different social media platforms

- Basic skills in photo & video editing (Canva, CapCut, Adobe or similar)

- Have the ability to plan, schedule, and manage social media posts

- Comfortable engaging with audiences (comments, messages, reviews)

- Comfortable handling light administrative tasks (e.g. updating POS systems, managing apps, running basic reports and other ad-hoc tasks as needed)

- Willingness to learn and adapt to new tools, systems, and workflows

- Strong attention to detail and consistency in execution

- Experience with event platforms (e.g. Eventbrite) is a plus

- Having proficiency in using analytics tools to track and measure the performance of digital marketing campaigns will be a bonus.





BENEFITS AND CULTURE

- Opportunity to work on dynamic hospitality brands in a creative environment

- Exposure to real-time marketing, events, and brand activations

- Supportive, collaborative, and fast-paced team culture

title: Virtual Quantity Surveyor — Remote (Philippines / Pakistan / South Africa) Mosaic Bespoke Ltd | Full-Time | Remote
description:
About Us

Mosaic Bespoke is a premium residential construction company based in Hertfordshire, UK, specialising in high-end bespoke homes, extensions, and refurbishments. With over 25 years in the industry, we're a tight, systems-driven team that takes preconstruction seriously, and we're growing.

We use JobTread as our central project management and cost platform, and we invest in building proper processes around cost control, procurement, and reporting. This isn't a tick-box QS role, it's a key operational position in a business that cares about doing things right.



The Role

We're looking for an experienced Virtual QS to join us part-time, working remotely. You'll be embedded in our preconstruction and delivery workflow, producing project timelines, estimates, managing cost plans, running CVR reporting, and supporting procurement across our live project pipeline.

Day-to-day responsibilities include:

Preparing detailed cost plans and estimates from planning drawings and specifications

Producing and managing Bills of Quantities (BOQ) for live projects

Running Cost-Value Reconciliation (CVR) reporting through JobTread

Supporting subcontractor procurement, packages, comparisons, and appointments

Managing variations, change control, and client cost reporting

Maintaining cost code discipline within JobTread (Labour / Materials / Subcontractor split)

Creating and Managing Project programs



What We're Looking For

Solid experience in UK residential construction, you must understand how UK projects are structured, priced, and delivered

A degree or equivalent in Quantity Surveying, Construction Management, or related field

Hands-on experience with JobTread, or a comparable construction cost platform (Builder Trend, Procore, Buildxact, etc.) — you'll learn our setup fast if the fundamentals are there

title: Norsktalende kundeservicemedarbejder
description:
Norsktalende kundeservicemedarbeider (Remote, CET arbeidstid)

Kan du levere bransjens beste service, og ønsker du å bli en viktig del av en virksomhet i vekst? Da kan dette være muligheten for deg.



Til en av Skandinavias ledende leverandører av eksklusive baderomsprodukter søker vi en engasjert og resultatorientert medarbeider til å betjene våre kunder i Danmark og Norge.



Stillingen er fullt remote, og arbeidstiden følger sentraleuropeisk tid (CET).



Som salgs- og kundeservicemedarbeider blir du en viktig del av et ungt og energisk team. Din viktigste oppgave vil være å øke salget til våre kunder – butikker, VVS-installatører og grossister – gjennom høy faglig kompetanse og profesjonell kundebehandling.

Intern støtte til våre eksterne selgere

Dine kvalifikasjoner

Du er utadvendt, energisk og har stor gjennomføringsevne

Du snakker og skriver flytende norsk (svensk er en fordel)

Du har en sterk interesse for salg og motiveres av å nå mål og skape resultater

Du har erfaring med salg og kundeservice

Du arbeider selvstendig og trives med ansvar og fleksibilitet

Vi tilbyr

En spennende og variert fulltidsstilling med fleksibel, remote arbeidshverdag

Egne ansvarsområder og gode utviklingsmuligheter

Støtte til å utvikle dine ferdigheter og nå ditt fulle potensial

Et positivt arbeidsmiljø med fokus på samarbeid og resultater

Grundig opplæring fra dyktige og hjelpsomme kollegaer

Løpende feedback og mulighet for videre karriereutvikling

Søk i dag!



Trives du med ansvar, påvirkningsmulighet og resultatskaping – og ønsker du å bli spesialist innen baderomsprodukter? Send din søknad og CV via vår QuickApply-knapp.



Vi gjennomfører intervjuer fortløpende og ansetter så snart vi finner riktig kandidat – så ikke vent med å søke!



Om oss

Strømberg Bad A/S er en progressiv og moderne virksomhet som gjennom det siste tiåret har utviklet en portefølje av eksklusive, stilrene baderomsprodukter for det nordiske markedet. Les mer på

title: Graphic Designer (Background Removal & Print File Preparation)
description:
About the Role:

We are a growing German e-commerce brand selling gardening-themed apparel (t-shirts and hoodies). We generate a large volume of original illustration designs using AI tools and need someone reliable to prepare these designs for print production.



Your daily tasks:

You will receive a batch of 20 to 100 design files (JPG/PNG) each day via Dropbox or Google Drive. For each design you need to:



1.Remove the background cleanly using Photoshop (pen tool, masking, or whatever method produces the cleanest result). 2.Output must be a transparent PNG with zero halos, no leftover background pixels, and clean smooth edges. This is the most important part of the job.

3.Check overall quality: flag any designs that have visual artifacts, distortions, or other issues.

4.Save the finished transparent PNGs to a designated output folder, keeping the original filename.



That is it. The role is focused and repetitive. We value speed, consistency, and attention to detail.

Requirements:



Must have: Photoshop (or equivalent like Photopea, Affinity Photo, GIMP) with strong masking and background removal skills. 



Fast internet for syncing files via Dropbox/Google Drive. Attention to detail, especially around edges of illustrations. Ability to process 30 to 100 images per day within 4 hours.



Nice to have: Experience with print file preparation or apparel/t-shirt design. Experience with e-commerce product images.

title: Finance Admin Support
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



Key Responsibilities:



Vendor Invoice Reconciliation

- Review and reconcile vendor invoices against purchase orders and service records.

- Ensure discrepancies are identified, documented, and resolved in collaboration with relevant departments.

- Maintain accurate records of all vendor transactions, adhering to company policies and timelines.



Memorial Revenue - Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)

- Track and allocate memorial revenue to ensure accurate reflection in COGS.

- Allocate Ticket IDs for Memorial expenses.

- Prepare monthly reports summarizing COGS associated with memorial services.



Legal Transaction Expenses

- Process and record legal transaction expenses.

- Allocate estate administration ticket IDs for legal expenses, coordinating with legal and finance teams for accuracy.

- Maintain detailed and organized records of legal expenses for audit and reporting purposes.



Customer Invoice Issuance

- Generate and issue invoices to customers promptly and accurately.

- Collaborate closely with front-line customer teams to ensure all service entries accurately reflect the services provided by the company.

- Respond to customer inquiries regarding invoices and provide necessary documentation as needed.



The ideal candidate will have:

- A very good understanding of English, and strong English speaking skills are vital

- A driving passion to helping people in a time of need

- Complete dedication to delivering a truly great customer experience

- Autonomous and ambitious.

- Strong attention to detail and methodical under pressure

description:
About the Role



As the Accounts Officer, you will play a critical role in supporting the financial operations of our client’s growing firm. Working closely with the Finance Manager, you will manage day-to-day accounts payable activities, ensure accurate financial processing, and maintain the integrity of our financial records.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, enjoys working with numbers, and has experience in Australian law firm accounting. You will be the primary point of contact for accounts payable inquiries, manage transactional processing, and support month-end and audit-related tasks.



If you thrive in a structured environment, demonstrate strong problem-solving skills, and take pride in delivering accurate, high-quality work, we’d love to meet you!





Key Responsibilities

Accounts Payable Management:



Process all supplier invoices for general business expenses.

Manage and process matter-related EFT payment requests for both the office account and trust account.

Monitor, manage, and action all
s in the Accounts Payable shared inbox.

Act as the main contact for internal and external queries related to accounts payable.

Financial Processing & Reconciliation:



Code disbursements and trust transactions in the practice management system.

title: Security & QA Coder
description:
About the Role

We build websites rapidly using AI-assisted (“vibe code”) tools like Claude. These sites need a sharp, senior engineer to regularly review, test, and secure them, catching issues that AI-generated code can introduce before they become real problems.

You’ll be our go-to expert for making sure every site we ship is clean, functional, and locked down.



What You’ll Do

Security Testing & Penetration Testing

Perform regular security audits on all live and staging sites

Test for common vulnerabilities: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, insecure authentication, exposed API keys, and misconfigured headers

Review AI-generated code for insecure patterns (e.g., unvalidated inputs, unsafe dependencies, weak auth flows)

Produce clear vulnerability reports with severity ratings and remediation steps

Verify fixes after issues are patched

Code Review & Bug Fixing

Review front-end and back-end code produced by AI tools (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, etc.)

Identify logic errors, redundant code, and anti-patterns common in vibe-coded outputs

Fix bugs directly or provide detailed guidance for fixing

Ensure code follows best practices for maintainability and readability

QA & Functional Testing

Test all core site functionality: forms, navigation, user flows, APIs, and integrations

Create and run test cases across browsers and devices (desktop + mobile)

Document bugs with clear reproduction steps

Regression test after deployments to ensure nothing breaks

Performance & Uptime

Run load and stress tests to identify bottlenecks

Monitor site speed using tools like Lighthouse, GTmetrix, or PageSpeed Insights

Flag slow queries, unoptimized assets, and poor caching configurations

Set up basic uptime monitoring and alert workflows



What We’re Looking For

Required:

5+ years of experience in web development, QA engineering, or application security

Strong knowledge of OWASP Top 10 and web security fundamentals

Hands-on experience with pen testing tools (Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, or similar)

Ability to read and review code across multiple languages (JS, Python, HTML/CSS at minimum)

Experience with functional and regression testing

Clear written communication — you’ll be writing reports and bug tickets

Nice to Have:

Familiarity with AI-generated code and its common failure modes

Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing (Jest, Playwright, Cypress, etc.)

Security certifications (CEH, OSCP, CompTIA Security+)

Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Vercel, Netlify)



How You’ll Work

Flexible hours, work when it suits you

Async-first communication (written reports, Slack/email updates)

Tools provided as needed

Direct access to codebases and staging environments

Regular check-ins to review findings and prioritize fixes

title: Virtual Leasing Coordinator / Real Estate Assistant (Phone & Email Communication)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:



We are a growing real estate business based in Chicago, USA, focused on helping clients find and secure rental properties. We are looking for a highly organized and confident Virtual Assistant to support our leasing process by communicating with listing agents, gathering property details, and coordinating showings.



This is a communication-heavy role, not just admin work. You will be speaking with real estate agents and assisting prospective tenants, so strong English communication skills (especially on the phone) are essential.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



 - Review incoming rental leads and match them with available listings

 - Call,
, and follow up with listing agents and property managers

 - Gather key information about listings, including:

 - Availability dates

 - Application requirements

 - Fees (application, admin, pet, etc.)

 - Showing instructions

 - Communicate property options clearly to prospective tenants

 - Schedule property showings on a shared calendar

 - Maintain accurate and organized records in Google Sheets or Excel

 - Follow up consistently to ensure no opportunities are missed



REQUIREMENTS (MUST HAVE):



 - Excellent spoken and written English

 - Strong phone communication skills (confident, clear, professional)

 - Experience speaking with clients, customers, or vendors

 - Highly organized and detail-oriented

 - Ability to follow instructions and work independently

 - Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



PREFERRED (BUT NOT REQUIRED):

 

 - Real estate experience (leasing, property management, or similar)

 - Experience with CRM systems (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

 - Experience working with U.S.-based clients



WORK EXPECTATIONS:



 - Handle 5–15 new leads per day (increasing over time)

 - Make outbound calls and send
s daily

 - Provide daily updates on progress and completed tasks

 - Be available during U.S. business hours (Central Time overlap preferred)



COMPENSATION:



 - Competitive hourly rate (based on experience)

 - Opportunity for long-term role and growth as the business scales



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT):



To be considered, you must complete ALL of the following:



 - Include the phrase “Blue Lease” in the subject line of your application

 - Attach a 1–2 minute voice recording where you:

    1) Pretend you are calling a real estate agent

    2) Introduce yourself

    3) Ask about a rental property (availability, fees, and showing details)

    4) Answer this question in your application:

         - “If a listing agent does not respond to your first message, what would you do next?”



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



WHY JOIN US:



This role has the potential to grow into a long-term position with increasing responsibility as our leasing operations expand. You will be a key part of a fast-moving real estate workflow and will gain valuable experience working in the U.S. property market.



We are looking to hire quickly. Apply today if you meet the qualifications and are ready to contribute!

title: Exclusive for Headhunters: Long-term cooperation with foreign teacher agencies & headhunters. High compensation for onli
description:
We are an educational institution with over ten years of industry experience and a large stable student base. As our business continues to expand, we have launched a new online English tutoring platform. We are now recruiting a large number of qualified online English teachers from the Philippines.

We sincerely extend a cooperation invitation to headhunters and agencies with high-quality, stable and large-scale teacher resources. We welcome partnership discussions to achieve resource complementarity and long-term win-win cooperation.



Recruitment Requirements

1.Able to steadily supply Filipino teachers in bulk, flexibly adjust the number of candidates according to our needs, and support long-term continuous cooperation.

2.All provided Filipino teachers must have fluent oral English proficiency and hold official teaching certifications such as TESOL or TEFL .

3.Teachers are required to have one-on-one English teaching experience (online teaching experience is preferred). They should be skilled in one-on-one teaching for kids and children, with excellent classroom interaction and communication abilities.

4.Cooperate with us in arranging trial lessons and qualification verification to ensure authentic personal information and qualified teaching capabilities.



Our Cooperation Advantages

1.Stable & High Demand: We own a large student group with consistent booking needs throughout morning, afternoon and evening peak hours.

2.Efficient Cooperation Process: Dedicated communication channel and exclusive staff for screening and follow-up. Transparent review procedures greatly improve cooperation efficiency.

3.Guaranteed Commission Payment: Commission is settled per successfully onboarded teacher, paid every two weeks with no payment delays.

4.Long-term In-depth Collaboration: Exclusive partnership will be established for outstanding partners with high-quality resources and efficient services, with priority access to all our recruitment demands.



Requirements for Partners

1.Individual recruiters or formal agencies with direct access to Filipino teacher resources, no multi-level intermediaries, ensuring stable supply and reasonable cost.

2.Capable of preliminary screening, including qualification checks and oral assessments, to provide pre-qualified candidates and reduce communication costs for both sides.

3.Cooperate with trial lesson assessments, pre-service training arrangements, and daily coordination such as schedule adjustments and basic issue feedback.

4.Uphold integrity in cooperation. Ensure all teacher information and certifications are authentic; no fake credentials or inexperienced teachers shall be recommended. All cooperation terms must be strictly followed.

5.Conduct internal screening to exclude teachers with poor work attitude and inactive communication habits.

6.Serious inquiries only.



Cooperation Scope & Services

1.Partners provide bulk resumes and basic information of Filipino teachers that meet our standards in terms of quantity, teaching experience and course adaptability.

2.After we complete resume screening and online interviews to confirm employment, partners assist with follow-up onboarding coordination.

3.Partners maintain daily basic communication with teachers to ensure smooth teaching operations.

4.Both sides conduct regular reviews to adjust teacher supply quantity and optimize cooperation procedures according to business development.



Cooperation Process

1.Demand Communication: Partners contact us and introduce their resource scale, teacher qualifications and supply capacity; both parties confirm detailed cooperation terms and models.

2.Resource Verification: Partners send sample teacher profiles for our qualification review and trial lessons to verify overall resource quality.

3.Trial Cooperation: Start small-scale trial cooperation to run in workflows. After confirming teaching quality and service performance, formal long-term bulk recruitment cooperation will be launched with commission settlement executed as agreed.



Note

Interested partners please attach a brief introduction of your Filipino teacher resources (scale, certification proportion, supply capacity, etc.) when contacting us for quick review and follow-up arrangement.

title: Senior Video Editor (Philippine Night Shift | Pacific Standard Time)
description:
About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: AI Automation Specialist (Claude Code + Paperclip + n8n)
description:
We build automated AI sales teams for B2B companies. You'll be setting up servers, installing AI tools, configuring AI agents, and building automation workflows. If you've worked with Claude Code, Paperclip AI, n8n, or similar tools, we want to talk to you.

What you'll do day to day:



Set up Linux servers on Hetzner (Ubuntu). Install and configure Paperclip AI and Claude Code. Create AI agent teams that research leads, write
s, and follow up automatically. Build n8n workflows that connect everything together (webhooks,
 sending, Google Sheets, Slack). Test everything and make sure it works before we hand it to the client. Repeat the process for new clients using our step-by-step guides.



What you need:

Comfortable working in a Linux terminal. Experience with Node.js and npm. Familiar with Git basics. Experience with n8n, Make, or Zapier. Have worked with AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT API, or similar. Can follow detailed SOPs independently.



Big bonus if you have:

Hands-on experience with Paperclip AI or Claude Code CLI. Built multi-agent AI systems before. Experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol).



What we offer:

$1200/month to start. Automatic raise of $100 every 4 months, up to $1,800/month. No negotiation, no politics. You show up, you do the work, you get the raise. 35 to 40 hours per week, flexible schedule. Long-term position, not a one-time project. You'll become our go-to technical person. We provide SOPs for everything. No guesswork.



How to apply:

Send a short message (not a novel) with: Your name and a quick intro (2 to 3 sentences). One example of something you've built with AI tools or automation (link, screenshot, or short description). When you can start.

That's it. No cover letter needed. Show us what you can do.

title: Part-Time Video Editor & Content Repurposer — Wellness Brand (TikTok & Instagram Reels)
description:
We're Tavo — an Irish functional wellness brand. Our product LiquidCalm just hit #1 on Amazon Ireland. We're looking for a sharp video editor who can find trending wellness content, remix it into scroll-stopping videos for our TikTok and Instagram Reels, and keep our accounts posting daily.

This is NOT a generic social media manager role. You need to understand what performs on short-form video, have strong editing instincts, and be able to turn other people's content into something original and on-brand.

What you'll do:



Use Kalodata (TikTok analytics tool) to find high-performing videos in the wellness, stress, sleep, ADHD, and self-care space

Edit and repurpose these into original content for Tavo's TikTok and Instagram Reels — using a mix of recuts with branding, text overlays, voiceover-style edits, green screen / stitch-style reactions, and whatever format fits the content

Prepare a weekly batch of 7 videos (one per day) every Sunday/Monday for the founder to review and approve

Once approved, schedule and post 1 video per day to both TikTok and Instagram Reels

Add Tavo branding elements (logo, brand colours, captions in our style) to every video

Stay on top of trending sounds, formats, and hooks in the wellness space



What we're looking for:



Strong short-form video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

You actively use TikTok and understand what makes content perform — hooks, pacing, trends

Experience with Kalodata or similar TikTok analytics tools (or willing to learn quickly — it's straightforward)

Creative eye — you can watch a video and immediately see how to remix it into something fresh

Reliable — we need daily posting, no gaps

Good English for captions and text overlays

Bonus: experience editing for wellness, health, or DTC brands



Tools you'll use:



Kalodata (finding trending content)

CapCut or your preferred editor (editing)

TikTok & Instagram (posting)

Google Drive (shared folder for batch approvals)

Later or Buffer (scheduling — optional)



Hours: 2–3 hours/day, Monday–Friday. The workflow is batch-based: research and edit early in the week, get approval, then schedule for daily posting. Flexible timing.

To apply: Please answer the screening questions below. Applications without answers will not be reviewed.



SCREENING QUESTIONS



Show me 2–3 examples of short-form videos you've edited for TikTok or Instagram Reels. Send links or a Google Drive folder.

Do you currently use TikTok yourself? What wellness, self-care, or mental health creators do you follow?

Go to TikTok right now and find one viral video (50k+ views) about stress relief, anxiety, or sleep. Send me the link and tell me in 2–3 sentences how you'd remix it into a branded video for a calm drink product.

What editing software do you use? How long would it take you to edit a 30–60 second video with text overlays, captions, and a branded intro?

Have you used Kalodata or any TikTok analytics tool before? If not, are you comfortable learning new tools quickly?

What is your expected hourly rate in USD?
