title: Senior Sales Specialist – High-Ticket Sales (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Senior Sales Virtual Specialist – High-Ticket Sales (Remote, Full-Time)



• Location: Remote (Philippines-based applicants preferred)

• Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (AEST)

• Company: My Home Design

• Compensation:

• Base Salary: $1,000 – $1,200 USD/month

• Commission: 2% on closed sales up to $200K AUD

• Performance Bonuses:

- $200K–$250K AUD: 1.5% commission on extra sales

- $250K–$300K AUD: 2% commission on extra sales

• Total Earning Potential: $3,000 – $5,500 USD/month (including performance bonuses)



Are You a High-Performance Sales Closer Used to Big KPIs?



We are looking for a highly experienced, results-driven Sales Specialist who thrives in high-ticket sales and is used to dealing with large revenue targets and big KPIs. This is not a typical sales role—it requires a seasoned sales professional who can confidently close high-value deals, handle high-net-worth clients, and consistently hit six-figure monthly sales targets. If you are a high achiever who excels in a performance-driven environment, has a strong track record in high-ticket sales, and wants to maximize your earning potential, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Your Role: Full Ownership of High-Ticket Sales



You will be responsible for end-to-end sales management, handling both inbound and outbound sales, nurturing client relationships, and driving revenue.



Lead Generation & Sales Outreach

• Proactively identify and engage high-value customers via calls,
s, and social platforms.

• Convert inbound inquiries into confirmed sales with a strong close rate.

• Develop strategies to increase sales volume and client retention.

• Research and target B2C and B2B clients, including interior designers, developers, and trade partners.



Customer Relationship Management

• Handle high-end clientele, providing a personalized and professional sales experience.

• Build and nurture long-term relationships with high-value customers.

• Understand client needs, offer tailored recommendations, and manage objections effectively.

• Ensure a high-touch customer service approach, providing timely responses and updates.



Order Processing, Customer Queries & Follow-Ups

• Manage the full sales cycle from inquiry to payment.

• Answer questions about customization, pricing, order tracking, and delivery timelines.

• Follow up on pending invoices, quotes, and payments.



Upselling & Cross-Selling

• Identify upselling opportunities to maximize order value.

• Recommend complementary products based on customer needs.



Showroom Sales Support & Appointments

• Encourage showroom visits and assist customers with private appointments.

• Coordinate with the in-store team to ensure a seamless buying experience.



Sales Reporting & KPI Management

• Track sales performance, revenue targets, and conversion rates.

• Provide regular reports on sales progress and identify areas for improvement.



Performance & Sales Expectations

• You are used to working with six-figure monthly sales targets and thrive in a high-performance sales environment.

• You are goal-driven, ambitious, and relentless in closing high-value deals.

• You can manage a strong pipeline of leads, ensuring continuous high sales volume.

• You have experience handling premium products and high-end clients who expect a superior level of service.



Tools You’ll Use

• Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

• CRM & Sales Management Tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

• Omnichannel Sales & Communication Platforms

• Shopify & Xero for invoicing and payment tracking

• WhatsApp, SMS, Calls &
 for direct customer engagement



What We’re Looking For

• 5+ years of experience in high-ticket sales, business development, or luxury retail.

• Proven track record of closing high-value deals ($5K–$50K+ per transaction).

• Experience managing six-figure monthly sales targets.

• Expert negotiation and persuasion skills – confident in handling high-value transactions.

• Excellent English communication (written and spoken) – articulate, persuasive, and professional.

• Highly self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently – no micromanagement, just results.

• Customer-centric approach with a passion for delivering exceptional service.

• Strong follow-up and organizational skills – ensuring all customer inquiries are resolved promptly.



Compensation & Commission Structure

• Base Salary: $1,000 – $1,200 USD per month

• Commission: 2% on all closed sales up to $200K AUD

• Performance Bonuses:

	•	$200K–$250K AUD: 1.5% commission on extra sales

	•	$250K–$300K AUD: 2% commission on extra sales

• Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (AEST)

• No earning limits – the more you sell, the more you earn!



Why Join Us?

• Work with a premium furniture brand that values quality and exceptional design.

• Be part of a fast-growing company with long-term career opportunities.

• Work closely with high-net-worth clients and trade professionals.



How to Apply

If you are an elite sales closer used to handling big KPIs and six-figure revenue targets, we want to hear from you!



To apply, please follow the application process through the job platform where this role is listed.



Optional: Include a 1-2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: Senior Full-Stack Product Integration Engineer - Trading Platform + Gateway + Chart + Voice
description:
We’re building Wealthy, a modern trading product that combines a frontend app, chart system, backend gateway, and AI voice layer into one customer-ready experience.



This is not a generic CRUD app role.



We need a strong engineer who can work across the integration layer and help turn an already-built foundation into a more stable, customer-ready product.

Frontend app built with React/Vite

Chart layer and chart embedding/integration

Redis

You are a strong fit if you have

Must-have

Strong TypeScript experience

Strong Node.js / Express backend experience

Solid React / Vite frontend experience

Experience with stateful systems and debugging auth/session/data-flow issues

Experience with WebSockets or realtime systems

Ability to productionize Python / FastAPI services

Ability to work inside an existing codebase without trying to rewrite everything

Nice-to-have

Trading platform or market-data experience

Chart-heavy UI experience

Redis + Docker experience

FastAPI inference/TTS service experience

Experience with gateway/backend systems that sit between UI and external providers

Rithmic or exchange/API integration exposure

Voice scope



We already have a working voice prototype.

We are not looking for a voice-model researcher.



We are looking for someone who can:



wrap the voice system into a production-ready FastAPI service

add Docker, health checks, logging, and Redis caching

support endpoints like:

/tts/generate

/tts/stream

/health

/voices

/tts/batch

integrate the voice service cleanly into the existing product stack

What success looks like



A strong first engagement would result in:



cleaner frontend/chart/gateway integration

more reliable backend/gateway behavior

clearer state truth and diagnostics

production-ready voice service wrapping

a tighter, more customer-ready product experience

How we work



We care about:



clean thinking

practical debugging

stable implementation

low-ego communication

working with the current architecture instead of blowing it up



We do not want someone who immediately wants to rewrite the whole stack.



To apply, send:

A short intro about your background

Your most relevant experience for this role

Examples of similar work:

frontend/backend integration

realtime systems

chart-heavy apps

FastAPI services

TTS or inference-service integration

Your hourly rate or preferred pricing

Your weekly availability

How you would approach a first contract like this

Any questions you’d want answered before starting

Bonus points



Include a short note on:



how you debug confusing state issues across frontend and backend

how you would approach integrating a prepared voice service into an existing product.  Tell me about a product where you had to stabilize both frontend and backend integration, not just build one side.

Have you worked with WebSockets, realtime feeds, or stateful session systems?

Have you worked on chart-heavy products or trading/financial apps?

Have you productionized a Python/FastAPI service before?

How do you handle joining an existing codebase with mixed legacy and active modules?

What would be your first step when debugging a system where the frontend says one thing and the backend/data source says another?

Are you comfortable working on a product that includes React/Vite, Node/TypeScript, charts, and voice-service integration?

title: Architect & Design Collective Intake

xico, Philippines, Central America, and South America)

Job Type: Project-Based / Freelance / Collaborative Opportunities



About Indigenous Just Transition (IJT)



We are not just designing buildings—we are restoring relationships between land, culture, and future generations.



Indigenous Just Transition (IJT) is an Indigenous-led organization building regenerative infrastructure, cultural spaces, and land-based projects across communities. Our work centers on honoring Indigenous sovereignty while co-creating spaces that reflect culture, ecology, and long-term stewardship.



Who We’re Looking For



We are inviting architects, designers, and spatial thinkers to join a growing international design ecosystem. We especially encourage applicants fro
xico, Central America, and South America who are aligned with the following values:



-Indigenous sovereignty and land-based design

-Regenerative and ecological architecture

-Cultural continuity and intergenerational knowledge

-Community-centered and place-based design practices



Our work is guided by:



Purple BluJ Design Principles — relational, human-centered, and justice-driven

Regenerative Design Perspectives — grounded in land, reciprocity, and long-term stewardship

What to Expect



This is not a traditional job application.



It is an invitation to explore:



-Alignment in values and design philosophy

-Collaborative opportunities across communities

-Shared vision for regenerative and culturally rooted design



Opportunities May Include:

-Paid project-based work

-Long-term collaboration

???? Assessment Form (English):

Join us in reimagining design as a practice of restoration, responsibility, and relationship.



Indigenous Just Transition (IJT)

Designing with land. Building with culture. Sustaining for generations.

title: 1.	High-Ticket Sales Closer – Remote & Uncapped Commission
description:
High-Ticket Sales Closer – Remote & Uncapped Commission



	•	Location: Remote

	•	Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (AEST)

	•	Company: My Home Design (Premium Furniture Brand)

	•	Compensation: 100% Commission-Based (No Base Salary)

	•	Earning Potential: $1,200 – $6,000+ AUD/month (performance-based)



Are You a High-Ticket Sales Closer Ready to Maximise Your Income?



We’re looking for a confident, experienced, and results-driven sales professional who thrives in a pure commission, high-performance environment. If you’re a natural closer, comfortable dealing with high-value clients, and ready to take ownership of your income, this is for you.



This is not a typical sales job – it’s an opportunity to earn significant commissions selling premium furniture to design-conscious clients across Australia.





What You’ll Do

	•	Handle inbound and outbound inquiries (phone,
, social media)

	•	Convert leads into closed sales ($5K–$50K+ AUD per transaction)

	•	Manage the sales pipeline and follow up on quotes, invoices, and payments

	•	Provide a personalised, high-end experience to every client

	•	Maintain clear records and communication using CRM tools



Ideal Candidate

	•	3+ years of experience in high-ticket sales

	•	Excellent negotiation and closing skills

	•	Confident with premium or luxury products

	•	Fluent in English (spoken and written)

	•	Self-motivated, driven, and able to work independently

	•	Comfortable managing high-value clients and long sales cycles





 Commission Structure (AUD)



	•	Sales up to $30,000/month – 3% commission ? Earn up to $900 AUD

	•	Sales between $30,001–$50,000/month – 4% commission ? Earn between $1,200–$2,000 AUD

	•	Sales above $50,000/month – 5% commission ? Earn $2,500+ AUD



No cap on earnings – the more you close, the more you earn.

Performance bonuses available for top performers.



Why Join My Home Design?

	•	Work remotely and independently

	•	Represent a high-quality, design-focused product range

	•	Join a growing business with supportive leadership

	•	Be rewarded based on what you deliver – no micromanagement, just results



To Apply:



Send your CV and a short message about why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Optional: Include a 1–2 minute voice note to showcase your communication style and confidence.

title: Logistics/Fulfillment Professional
description:
Join One of Australia’s Fastest Growing Modern Furniture Brands!



At Life Interiors, we’re passionate about making great design accessible to all. As one of Australia’s most rapidly expanding homeware and furniture brands, we’re committed to delivering exceptional experiences—for both our customers and our team.



The Role:



Reporting into the Logistics Team Leader, the Logistics Professional will support customers, customer service and delivery activities by ensuring customer’s orders are processed for delivery with the appropriate courier partner in a timely manner. The focus will be on order fulfilment and supply chain activities, as well as assisting with adhoc requests from the Sales and Customer Service teams.



What you’ll be doing:



* Contributing to a positive and high performing team

* Exceeding Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

* Scheduling of outgoing shipments

* Preparing shipping labels

* Determining methods of shipping for adhoc/non-standard orders

* Obtain freight quotes from various carriers in a timely manner

* Maintaining all computerised shipping and distribution records

* Troubleshoots shipping issues and customer complaints that arise and work to solve them to a high standard

* Identify and raise logistics issues quickly

* Maintaining positive & constructive relationships with all stakeholders

* Rolling up your sleeves and helping answer
s, calls & live chats if/when required

* Adhoc requests as directed by management

* Comfortable using a time-tracker



What we are looking for:



* At least 2 years of experience in logistics, fulfillment, or supply chain management.

* Bachelor’s degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, Business Administration, or a related field (preferred but not always required).

* Strong understanding of inventory management, order processing, and warehouse operations.

* Excellent organizational and problem-solving skills.

* Strong attention to detail and ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment.

* Knowledge of shipping regulations, carrier coordination, and customs procedures (if applicable).

* Ability to work collaboratively with vendors, suppliers, and internal teams.

* Good communication and customer service skills.

* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel and Word)



What We Offer:



* Salary offered: 35k depending on experience

* 13th month performance based bonus paid in December

* Annual performance and salary review every June

* HMO with an additional dependent

* 10 days Vacation leave

* 5 days Sick leave

* 3 days additional PTO (Christmas day, New Year’s day, & Good Friday)

* Full-time day shift (9:00 am to 6:00 pm - Australian Eastern Daylight Time (AEDT))

* Permanent work from home set-up

description:
Join one of Australia’s Fastest Growing Modern Furniture Brands!



At Life Interiors, we’re passionate about making great design accessible to all. As one Australia’s most rapidly expanding homeware and furniture brand, we’re committed to delivering exceptional experiences for both our customers and our team.



The role

This role will emphasize building and maintaining strong, long-term relationships with our customers. The ideal candidate will possess excellent communication skills, a positive attitude, and a passion for ensuring customer satisfaction while fostering loyalty and trust.



What you’ll be doing:

experience with the company. Ensure customers feel valued, heard, and well-supported throughout their journey.

*Issue Resolution: Act as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries, concerns, or issues. Respond promptly and

effectively to ensure customer satisfaction.

*Proactive Outreach: Reach out to existing customers to ensure continued satisfaction, gather feedback, and identify

opportunities for improvements in products or services.

*Customer Retention: Implement strategies and best practices to drive customer retention, resolve complaints effectively,

and maximize overall satisfaction.

*Customer Education: Provide clear and concise information about products or services ensuring customers understand all

offerings and are equipped to make informed decisions.

*Feedback Collection: Collect and analyze customer feedback to identify trends, needs, and areas for improvement,

*Reporting and Documentation: Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, transactions, and feedback using CRM

tools or customer service platforms.

accordance with established processes.

title: Outbound Cold Email Marketing, LinkedIn, SEO & Social Media Virtual Assistant
description:
Q3 Interactive is seeking a highly capable Virtual Assistant to support outbound lead generation, SEO, and social media marketing for a U.S.-based digital agency seeking more qualified leads fro
dical device, biotech, and pharmaceutical companies. We specialize in building visual sales tools for medical device, biotech, and pharmaceutical companies to explain complicated processes through 3D Animation, video production, mobile app development, website design and programming, graphic design and illustration, and AR/VR environments for product demos.



We are a small studio based in Utah (USA) (Mountain time zone [GMT-7]), with a distributed workforce of 3D artists and Full-stack programmers scattered throughout India.



This VA role blends lead generation, content visibility, and campaign execution. You will help drive both outbound pipeline and inbound awareness, working directly with the President & CEO.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can execute across multiple marketing channels, take ownership of results, and earn consistent incentive bonuses for booking meetings with the CEO. If these meetings result in new business, you earn even MORE.



- Targeted, filtered, qualified, verified
 lead generation (
, Trusted Leads)

- Outbound cold
 lead generation & campaigns (Instantly)

- The purpose of all the above is to get interested prospects booked for a call/meeting on the CEO's calendar



_____

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Outbound Lead Generation & Campaigns

Build targeted decision-maker lead lists using:

•

• LinkedIn



Manage cold
 campaigns via:

Manage LinkedIn outreach via:

• Dripify



Track and improve:

• Reply rates

• Booked calls/meetings



2. SEO (Search Engine Optimization)

Optimize website pages (ours and our clients') and blog content:

• Titles, meta descriptions, headers

Assist with content planning:

• Blog topics

• SEO-driven content outlines



Monitor performance:

• Search engine rankings

• Visibility and ranking on AI platforms

• Traffic trends

• Keyword opportunities

Tools may include: Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar



3. Social Media Campaign Management

Create and manage campaigns for:

• Q3 Interactive (our website)

• Client accounts



Platforms:

• LinkedIn (primary)

• Secondary: Instagram /
 (as needed)



Responsibilities:

• Content scheduling

• Post creation (text + light visuals)

• Campaign planning (organic + paid if applicable)

• Engagement monitoring



Collaborate on:

• Thought leadership posts

• Case study highlights

• Short-form content derived from projects



4. Content Repurposing

Turn:

•
s ? LinkedIn posts

• Case studies ? social posts

• Videos ? short-form content



5. Reporting & Performance Tracking

Provide weekly reporting on:

• Leads generated

•
 performance (open/reply rates)

• SEO progress (rankings, traffic)

• Social media growth (engagement, reach)

• Campaign insights and recommendations



SUCCESS METRICS (KPIs)

Outbound:

• 1,000–3,000
s/week

• 3–8% reply rate

• 5–15 qualified conversations/week

• 3–8 booked calls/meetings per week



SEO:

Growth in organic traffic

• Improved keyword rankings

• Visibility on AI Platforms (Chat GPT, Claude, Grok, Gemini, Others)

• Increased inbound inquiries over time



Social:

• Consistent posting (3–5x/week)

• Increasing engagement rates

• Growth in followers (quality > quantity)



REQUIREMENTS

Must Have:

•Proven experience with:

• Apollo (lead generation) or similar

• Instantly 
 campaigns) or similar

• LinkedIn prospecting + outreach

• Dripify or similar tools



SEO experience:

• High skill level in improving visibility and rankings for search engines and AI Platforms 

• Keyword research, competitor intel, Meta Tag/Title/Keyword optimization

• Experience in submitting sites to search engines and rank tracking

• Basic analytics understanding



Social media experience:

• Campaign planning

• Content writing

• Ad creation

• Scheduling tools



Self-Starter

• “How else can I help?” attitude when all responsibilities and systems are running well and producing

• Pro-active mindset - go beyond. Impress me by identifying opportunities and addressing them. Be the Yin to my Yang.

• Core understanding that freeing my time for high-level client interaction is valuable



Strong written English (natural, human tone)



Nice to Have:

• Basic design skills (Canva or similar)

• Familiarity with CRM systems (Nutshell CRM)

• Experience in the medical, biotech, or technical industries



COMPENSATION

• $4–$6/hour depending on experience

• Additional performance incentives tied to hitting goals for:

     • Qualified leads that lead to booked online meetings or calls ($5 each)

     • Closed deals /new business ($30-$70 each)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

You consistently:

• Generate qualified leads that result in online meetings to scope out projects

• Keep
 and LinkedIn outreach running smoothly and performing at a high level

• Improve company visibility through SEO fine-tuning and social media excitement

• Contribute to real business growth—not just activity or keeping busy

• Free up the owner’s time to focus on closing new business, managing development team progress, and nurturing existing (and new) clients



To apply, please:

• Share your proficiency in tools you’ve used (Apollo, Instantly, SEO tools, etc.)

• Provide a sample lead list (10 contacts) and a sample outreach

• Briefly explain a campaign you’ve managed and the results

• (Optional, but meaningful) Video recording /introduction with a convincing pitch on your experience, examples of increasing qualified leads and bookings, and why you would be my best choice as my VA.

title: Referral Outreach Specialist
description:

Your primary focus will be outbound calling and outreach to hospitals, nursing homes, assisted living facilities, home health agencies, and other healthcare providers to introduce our services and secure referral partnerships.



Key Responsibilities:

    •    Present and explain our services clearly and professionally

    •    Build and maintain strong relationships with referral sources

    •    Document all calls, contacts, and outcomes in the CRM/KPI tracker

    •    Follow up consistently with prospects and existing partners

Performance Expectations:

Compensation & Growth:

title: Mass Messaging Specialist
description:
Please Apply Here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly disciplined and detail-oriented Messaging Operations Specialist to join our growth team. In this role, you are the engine room of our messaging department — accountable for the flawless execution, scheduling, and delivery of mass messaging campaigns and retention sequences.



You will be handling multiple creator accounts daily, with high message volume.



Your job is to take proven strategy and high-converting copy and ensure it reaches the right audience at the exact right time.



This is a pure execution role — not a strategy or creative position. If you pride yourself on speed, accuracy, and never missing a deadline, this role is built for you.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

> Campaign Execution - Schedule and send all mass messaging across assigned creator accounts based on the daily and weekly plan.

> Funnel Maintenance - Update and manage nudge sequences and automated follow-ups to ensure no lead goes cold.

> Retention Campaigns - Execute re-subscription and win-back campaigns based on targeting and instructions provided.

> Reporting - Track and log execution metrics to ensure all campaigns are deployed accurately and on time.

> SOP Adherence - Follow strict internal workflows to maintain consistency, accuracy, and account safety at all times.



WHO YOU ARE

> Highly Organized - You rely on systems, checklists, and precision. Nothing slips through the cracks.

> Reliable & Fast - You execute quickly without sacrificing accuracy. Deadlines are non-negotiable for you.

> Instruction-Focused - You follow SOPs exactly — no guesswork, no improvisation. You execute what's given.

> Detail-Oriented - You double-check links, pricing, targeting, and timing before every single send.

> Tech-Savvy - You navigate tools and platforms efficiently with a stable setup and reliable internet.





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Performance is measured by three things:

•  On-time campaign execution

•  Zero-error sends

•  Consistent daily output volume



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

> Base Salary $400 – $600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Based on execution quality, accuracy, and consistency

> Tenure Growth - Salary increases tied to consistent performance over time

> Growth Path - Opportunity to move into QA, QM, or higher operational roles



We invest in people who show up, execute consistently, and take ownership of their output. Strong performers have a clear path to grow within the operation.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
About Us:

We are a Hawaii-based real estate investment and development firm operating across Oahu, the

Big Island, and Kauai. We source off-market deals, manage ground-up construction projects, and work across

the full spectrum from wholesaling to luxury development. We move fast, keep it lean, and expect the people

we work with to do the same.



Role Overview:

We are looking for a sharp, reliable, and self-directed Virtual Assistant to support our operations on a day-to-

day basis. This is a high-trust role — you will work directly with the principal and be exposed to real

transactions, client communication, and deal flow. The right person is proactive, detail-oriented, highly

organized, and comfortable working across multiple platforms without needing constant supervision.



Core Responsibilities:


 & Communication Management

• Monitor, organize, and prioritize the principal's inbox daily

• Draft, edit, and send professional
s on behalf of the principal

• Follow up with vendors, contractors, title companies, and clients

• Flag time-sensitive messages and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

• Maintain clean folder/label structure and inbox hygiene



Document Drafting & DocuSign

• Prepare purchase agreements, LOIs, NDAs, and other real estate documents from templates

• Set up and send DocuSign envelopes with correct routing and signing order

• Track document status and follow up on unsigned agreements

• Organize executed documents into the correct folders/cloud storage

• Assist with formatting and proofreading documents before distribution



Invoice Tracking & Basic Bookkeeping Support

• Log incoming and outgoing invoices across projects

• Track payment status and flag overdue invoices

• Reconcile invoices against project budgets and flag discrepancies

• Maintain an organized invoice tracker (Google Sheets or any project management tools)

• Coordinate with contractors and vendors on billing matters

• Track paid invoices/receipts to specific projects



What We Are Looking For

• Proficient in English — clear, professional, and concise

• Prior experience supporting a business owner, executive, or real estate professional

• Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

• Hands-on experience with DocuSign or a similar e-signature platform

• Experience managing or tracking invoices and vendor payments

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail

• Able to work independently, take ownership, and ask smart questions

• Comfortable communicating directly with clients, vendors, and partners

• Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace



Preferred (Not Required)

• Background in real estate, property management, or construction

• Familiarity with title companies, escrow processes, or closing docs

• Experience with tools like Slack and Monday.com

• Basic understanding of U.S. real estate transactions

Schedule & Availability



This role operates primarily on Hawaii Standard Time (HST). Core availability windows are expected during

Hawaii business hours.



Compensation & Growth

Monthly Rate: $400–$500 USD (based on experience)

Payment: Bi-weekly or monthly via Wise / PayPal

Working Hours: 8am – 12pm HST (Part-time)

Orientation: Full orientation and onboarding provided during first 2 weeks

Growth: 60-day review to assess fit and consider transition to full-time role



How to Apply

Send your resume to 
 will reach out to you within a week upon your

submission.

title: Video Editor Needed for Premium Men's Skincare Ads in Caldera+Lab Style
description:
We are looking for a high-level video editor to create premium, performance-driven video ads for our men’s skincare brand Dr. Tallow, with a specific focus on our Alpha Anti-Aging Tallow Face Cream.



Your assignment is to create video ads that are strongly inspired by the structure, pace, visual language, and conversion logic of Caldera+Lab videos, but fully adapted to our brand, our product, and our customer.



This is not a generic skincare editing job. We want someone who understands how to combine premium brand aesthetics with direct-response performance editing.



Our product page for context:







What We Want



We want video creatives that make our product feel:



Focus area

Direction

Brand feel

Premium, masculine, sharp, cinematic

Customer emotion

Fresher, less tired, more confident, more attractive

Positioning

Simple anti-aging skincare for men who do not want a complicated routine

Overall style

Caldera+Lab-inspired, but distinctly Dr. Tallow









The editor should be able to recreate the performance logic of strong competitor ads while keeping the final result aligned with our brand. The style should feel modern, masculine, editorial, and high-converting.



Main Angles to Build Around



The main creative angles are the following:



Angle

Meaning

Anti-aging / less tired

Men want to look fresher, less worn out, and more like themselves

Simple routine / men who hate skincare

Men do not want a 10-step routine; they want one strong product

Confidence / women notice

Better skin improves first impressions, presence, and attractiveness









What You Should Be Able to Do



We are looking for someone who can take a broad mix of footage and turn it into strong ad creatives with clear hooks, clean structure, and premium presentation.



You should be comfortable working with:



Skill area

What we expect

Ad editing

Strong first 1–3 seconds, clear pacing, scroll-stopping structure

Creative direction

Understand how to mirror winning competitor frameworks without making low-quality copies

Typography & layout

Premium text overlays, clean hierarchy, strong editorial taste

Narrative assembly

Build persuasive sequences from product shots, lifestyle clips, social clips, sourced footage, and testimonials

Masculine premium aesthetic

Make the brand feel rugged, refined, simple, and expensive









Source Material You May Use



You are free to use a combination of sources in order to create the strongest final ads.



Source

Usage

Caldera+Lab videos

Use as creative benchmark for structure, pacing, and style

Competitor video content

Use for inspiration and high-level creative pattern matching

TikTok / podcasts / social content / tallow-related clips

You may self-source and scrape relevant content to strengthen the edits

Our Google Drive

You may use any useful existing brand assets, raw footage, product shots, testimonials, or creator assets: 

AI-generated content

You are free to add AI-generated content from Freepik, Higgsfield, HeyGen, or similar tools where useful, as long as it fits the brand and feels naturally integrated









Creative Direction



The output should feel premium and masculine, not cosmetic or overly soft. We want content that looks like it belongs in a modern premiu
n’s grooming brand, while still functioning as strong ad creative.



Use more of this

Use less of this

Dark luxury

Bright generic beauty aesthetics

Masculine grooming energy

Feminine skincare language

Clear hooks and contrast

Slow vague intros

Realistic, attractive male talent

Overly polished fake-looking beauty visuals

Clean editorial typography

Cluttered, cheap ad layouts

Confident premium tone

Cheesy or overly salesy execution









Deliverables



We are looking for multiple ad concepts and variations, not just one single edit.



Deliverable

Requirement

Concepts

Multiple video concepts

Lengths

Ideally 15s, 20s, and 30s cuts

Format

Vertical-first for performance placements

Variations

Different hooks, different angles, different pacing approaches









Important Note for Applicants



To increase your chance of getting hired, you are welcome to send a short test video for our product as part of your application.



This is optional, but candidates who already show that they understand the visual language, pacing, and creative direction we want will have a significantly higher chance of being selected.



If you d
 to do this, focus on our product here:







What Good Work Looks Like



A strong submission should make us feel that you understand all of the following:



Signal

What it means

Premium taste

The edit feels expensive, clean, and well-directed

Performance instinct

The video opens strong and stays clear

Brand fit

The work feels masculine, simple, and aligned with Dr. Tallow

Creative intelligence

You understand what makes Caldera+Lab-style ads effective









If you are confident that you can create premium masculine skincare ads with strong performance structure, we would love to see your work.

title: Customer Service Representative with Property Management Experience
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



The Nabo Group is looking for Customer Service Representative with Property Management experience for our growing team, who enjoys solving problems, responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable to join our fun/hard working team. You must have excellent communication skills.



As a Customer Service Representative, you will play a critical role in fostering positive relationships with our clients and ensuring that their maintenance needs are met effectively and efficiently. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and help maintain our reputation for excellence in the maintenance industry.



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Client Communication: Act as the primary point of contact for clients, providing exceptional customer service and ensuring clear and professional communication. Respond to client inquiries via phone,
, and online platforms.

- Maintenance Coordination: Work closely with the maintenance team to schedule, track, and coordinate maintenance services, ensuring timely and accurate completion of tasks.

- Issue Resolution: Address and resolve client complaints or concerns regarding maintenance services in a timely, professional, and empathetic manner.

- Client Scheduling & Follow-Up: Schedule appointments for maintenance services and follow up with clients’ post-service to ensure satisfaction and gather feedback.

- Database Management: Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of client interactions, maintenance schedules, and work orders within the company’s CRM system.

- Problem Solving & Troubleshooting: Provide quick solutions to client issues and coordinate any necessary follow-up or additional service visits.

- Collaboration: Work closely with field technicians, supervisors, and other team members to ensure the smooth flow of maintenance services from start to finish.

- Service Knowledge: Stay informed about the company’s maintenance offerings and ensure clients are fully aware of the services available to them.

- Reporting & Documentation: Document client interactions, service requests, and resolutions. Generate reports to track the progress and outcomes of maintenance activities.

- Performs other duties that may be assigned from time to time.



Desired Qualifications:

- College degree or equivalent work experience.

- Experience with Real Estate is a plus.

- At least 6 months of experience working remotely.

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent interpersonal skills, problem solving, and analytical skills.

- Strong customer service skills.

- Ability to multi-task and prioritize.

- Reliable and dependable.

- Excellent problem-solving skills.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure.

- Attention to details and highly organized.

- Great time management skills.

- Capable of keeping control of the call even when the customer is angry.

- Ethical and trustworthy.

- Great at relationship-building.

- Ability to work under minimal supervision.

- Friendly and fair.



Working conditions:

title: Part-Time 2D Game Artist - Hand-Drawn Doodle Style (Indie Game, Heading to Steam)
description:
Hi! I'm an indie game developer looking for a talented 2D artist to join me part-time on an ongoing basis.



I just shipped my first game "Anachronistic Survivors" - a bullet heaven where you build an absurd town. It was made for a game jam and I'm now developing it into a full Steam release. The game is fully playable but all the art is placeholder. I need someone to give it a real visual identity.



You can play the current version here: 



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:



Starting project - reskin all existing assets (~35-40 sprites):



Characters (3):

- Crappy Knight, Sushi Chef, French Baker



Enemies (6):

- Angry Potato Blob, Angry Cyclist, Angry Boulder, Angry Chef, Angry Bees, Russian Nesting Doll



Buildings (9):

- Blacksmith, Bakery, Gun Store, Sushi Bar, Junkyard, Tennis Club, Landscaper, School, Spa



Projectiles (6):

- Sword, baguette, gun, nigiri sushi, water droplet, frying pan



Pickups & objects:

- XP gem, building material, health heart, wooden crate, signpost, sprinkler



Other:

- Arena background, title logo, basic UI elements



After the reskin, ongoing work will include:

- New characters, enemies, buildings, and weapons as the game expands

- Possible sprite sheet animations

- Steam store assets (capsule images, banners, icons)

- Marketing materials



ART STYLE REQUIRED:

- Hand-drawn doodle aesthetic similar to the game "Brotato"

- Front-facing character sprites for a top-down game

- Bold outlines, flat colors, cartoony and silly

- NOT pixel art - should look hand-drawn

- Character/enemy sprites at 256x256, projectiles/pickups at 64x64

- PNG with transparent background + source files



THE IDEAL PERSON:

- Has a portfolio showing hand-drawn, cartoony, or doodle-style game art

- Can maintain a consistent style across many different assets

- Is reliable and communicates well

- Bonus: has experience making art for games (understands readability, silhouettes, color contrast)

- Bonus: familiar with Unity sprite requirements



SCHEDULE:

- Part-time, flexible hours - no fixed schedule required

- Estimated 10-20 hours/week depending on workload

- Long-term collaboration - this project will be in development for months



TO APPLY:

- Share your portfolio (especially any hand-drawn or cartoony game art)

- Tell me your hourly rate

- Pick one asset from the list above and describe how you'd approach drawing it (no need to actually draw it, just explain your thinking)



I'm easy to work with, give clear direction, and value quality over speed. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Hands-on experience editing ads for Meta 
 and Instagram)

title: AI Static Image Designer -  (REMOTE - Full Time)
description:
AI Static Image Designer



Location: Remote



Type: Full-Time



Compensation: $1,250 USD/month base + performance bonuses on every winning ad and clear path to $2,500+/month base.



About Us:



We are a DTC supplement brand selling on Shopify and acquiring customers through Meta. We are currently scaling one core product with an aggressive creative testing strategy and a clear roadmap to expand into multiple SKUs and channels. Our growth model is simple: whoever tests the most creative wins. We operate from an AI-focused standpoint, leveraging AI tools to produce ad creative at a volume and speed that most brands cannot match. This role is central to that mission.



About the Role:



We are looking for an AI Static Image Designer to take full ownership of our static ad creative pipeline. You will be the sole person responsible for producing every static image that goes into our Meta ad account. This is not a support role. You are the static creative department. You will produce 30-50 images per day across approximately 10 unique concepts with multiple variations of each. You will work directly with our media buying team to understand what is performing, iterate on winners rapidly, and keep the pipeline full of fresh creative for testing.



This is a high-output, high-autonomy role. We will provide direction on angles, hooks, and product messaging. We will not hold your hand on execution. You figure out how to produce the work. You manage your own time. You deliver every single day without being chased.



Core Responsibilities:



Static Ad Creative Production:



Produce 30-50 static ad images per day using AI generation tools (Nanobanana, Flux, Sora, Midjourney, ChatGPT, or similar) combined with Canva and/or Photoshop for finishing and compositing.



Create approximately 10 unique concepts daily with multiple variations per concept (different backgrounds, text overlays, layouts, crops, color treatments).



All images must look natural and authentic. The majority of what you produce will be native-style ad images that blend seamlessly into a news feed and do not look like ads. Think organic photos, real-looking lifestyle content, and editorial-style visuals that someone would scroll past thinking a real person posted it. 



You will also create landing page hero images, product photography-style shots, general marketing graphics, and any other static assets the team needs to test and scale.





Performance Creative Iteration:



Review ad performance data weekly with the media buying team.



When a concept wins, produce 5-10 variations of it the same day.



Kill underperforming angles quickly and replace them with new concepts without being told.



SOP Development and Team Scaling



Build clear, documented SOPs for every process and workflow you develop.



Document your AI prompting strategies, tool workflows, and quality control steps so that future tea
mbers can be trained and onboarded quickly.



Your SOPs should be detailed enough that someone with basic design skills could follow them and produce similar output.





Qualifications:



Already using AI image generation tools (Nanobanana, Flux, Midjourney, Sora, ChatGPT image gen, or similar) daily in your current workflow. Not "willing to learn." Already doing it.



Highly proficient in Canva and/or Photoshop for compositing, retouching, text overlay, and finishing AI-generated outputs.

Strong AI prompting skills. You know how to write prompts that produce usable output on the first or second attempt.



Able to produce a wide variety of image styles: lifestyle, editorial, flat lay, studio, UGC-style, nature backgrounds, and more.

Self-managed. You do not need daily check-ins to stay productive.



Fast. 30-50 images per day requires a system and a workflow, not guesswork.



Experience creating images for Meta ads 
/Instagram) preferred.



Experience in health, supplements, or wellness preferred.



Understanding of direct response advertising and what makes a scroll-stopping image preferred.



Why Join Us:



You will not be a cog in a machine. You will own an entire creative function inside a brand that is scaling aggressively with serious 
ntum behind it. As we expand into new products and new channels, your role grows. There is a clear path to creative lead as the team scales. You will receive performance bonuses on every winning ad, meaning the better you are, the more you make. This is the ground floor of something big for the right person.



How to Apply:



READ THIS CAREFULLY. We receive hundreds of applications. If you do not follow these instructions exactly, your application will not be read.



1. Start your application message with the exact words "Static Pipeline" as the first line. This tells us you read the full post.



2. Include a link to a Google Drive folder or portfolio containing at least 10 AI-generated images you personally created. Not templates. Not Canva drag-and-drop. Images you prompted, generated, and finished yourself.



3. In 2-3 sentences, describe what tools you open first thing in the morning and what your process looks like from concept to finished image. We want to see that you already have a system.



4. Why should we hire you over others? Explain your skills, experience, etc.

title: Google my business and digital marketing expert
description:
We are seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented professional to take full ownership of the creation, management, and ongoing optimisation of multiple Google Business Profiles (GMBs) across various service areas.



This role requires someone with proven experience in handling Google Business Profiles at scale, including setting up new listings, maintaining accuracy, and ensuring compliance with Google’s guidelines. You will be responsible for building and managing structured spreadsheets that track all listings, including login details, service areas, categories, updates, and performance metrics. Accuracy, consistency, and the ability to manage large datasets efficiently are critical.



A key part of this role involves actively managing listings to keep them optimised and ranking well. This includes regularly updating business information, uploading content, monitoring reviews, and identifying opportunities to improve visibility and engagement.



You must also have strong experience in resolving suspended Google Business Profiles. This includes identifying the root cause of suspensions, preparing and submitting reinstatement requests, and communicating effectively with Google support to ensure profiles are reinstated as quickly as possible. Familiarity with common suspension triggers and how to avoid them is essential.



We are looking for someone who is proactive, reliable, and capable of working independently. You should be comfortable handling multiple profiles at once, prioritising tasks, and maintaining clear documentation. Experience in local SEO, particularly within service-based industries, will be highly regarded

title: Senior Relationship Manager – VIP & Sponsorships
description:
About the Role



Unbridled is a U.S.-based organization producing high-end luxury events attended by celebrities, high-net-worth individuals, and business leaders. We are seeking a polished, fluent English-speaking sales professional to help grow ticket sales, sponsorships, and VIP participation (
).

title: Business Development Associate
description:
Job Description: 

We are seeking a dynamic and driven Sales Specialist to join our team in helping find and secure sponsors for CSurgeries, an online peer reviewed medical journal. The successful candidate will be responsible for identifying and engaging with sponsors and developing and executing sales strategies and ultimately selling sponsorships and other sales and services.   

Key Responsibilities: 

Lead Generation: 

• Identify and research potential sponsors for CSurgeries products 

• Utilize various channels such as online platforms, networking events, and referrals to generate leads 

• Maintain an organized database of leads and track their progress through the sales pipeline 

Sales Strategy Development: 

• Develop a comprehensive sales strategy to effectively reach and engage with target sponsors 

• Create compelling value propositions and sales pitches that highlight the benefits of our services 

• Collaborate with the marketing team to create targeted campaigns and promotional materials 

Outreach and Relationship Building: 

• Initiate contact with potential clients through phone calls,
s, and social media 

• Build rapport and establish trust with sponsors by understanding their unique needs and challenges 

• Schedule and conduct meetings and presentations to showcase our services and value proposition 

Performance Tracking and Reporting: 

• Monitor and report on key sales metrics, including leads generated, conversion rates, and revenue generated 

• Regularly update the CRM system with accurate client information and sales progress 

• Provide insights and recommendations to improve the sales process and overall performance 

Requirements: 

• Proven track record of success in a sales role, preferably in the B2B or professional services sector 

• Strong understanding of CSurgeries products and services 

• Excellent communication, interpersonal, and relationship-building skills 

• Ability to think strategically and develop effective sales plans 

• Proficiency in using CRM systems and sales tools 

• Self-motivated, results-driven, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment 

• Bachelor's degree in business, marketing, or a related field (preferred) 

If you are passionate about the healthcare industry and have a talent for sales, we would love to hear from you. Join our team and make a meaningful impact in the startup community while advancing your career in sales.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Operations Executive
description:
About Limitless

We are changing the way sales works. Instead of mass outreach and spam, we act as an instant matchmaking service for our clients, providing them with a pre-built CRM and highly researched, hyper-personalised introductions every single day.



The Role

We are looking for an Operations Executive to join our offshore team. To be completely transparent, this is a highly repetitive, execution-heavy role. You will be the crucial final step in our automated lead generation system. Your primary job will be navigating our internal software, doing quality checks, and clicking through processes to ensure our clients receive their daily leads. 

While the physical work is essentially "pressing buttons", the impact is massive. We require absolute perfection in execution; our standard is 100% with no exceptions.



Key Responsibilities

Daily Drip Feeds: Log into client accounts daily to execute the "drip feed" process, sending out 3 to 5 hyper-personalised introductions per client.

System Operation: Generate HTML
s within our platform, copy them into Gmail, and send them to the appropriate targets.

Quality Control (QC): Spend time per lead ensuring that the
 content and the identified stakeholders perfectly match before hitting send.

Accountability: Log every sent
 accurately (including company target and Gmail URL) to keep our daily forecasting and tracking 100% accurate.



Requirements

Incredible Attention to Detail: Sending the wrong information to the wrong stakeholder is not an option. You must be meticulous.

Highly "Switched On" & Quick Learner: You need to pick up our proprietary systems quickly and operate them flawlessly.

Process-Driven: You are perfectly comfortable doing repetitive, click-heavy tasks without losing focus or dropping your standards.

Proactive Communicator: If something is broken or a system is down, you flag it immediately rather than waiting to be asked.

title: Platform Operations Specialist
description:
Company Description

We’re on a mission to replace messy guesswork with precision engineering. Instead of selling our clients complicated software they have to manage, we do the heavy lifting behind the scenes. Our internal engine builds hyper-customized, heavily researched data packages for them in under 30 minutes. We deliver flawless, ready-to-use assets straight to their inbox.



The Role

Let’s be totally transparent: this is a highly repetitive, execution-heavy role. You will be the human engine behind our tech. Your day will involve navigating our internal software, running rigorous quality checks, and clicking through processes to make sure our clients get their daily leads perfectly packaged.



While the physical work is essentially "pressing buttons," the impact you have is massive. We need someone who genuinely loves getting things 100% right, every single time.



What you’ll be doing:

- Running the machine: Navigating our internal software to process daily data sets, run predefined workflows, and generate highly accurate outputs.

- Deep diving: Conducting targeted online research to gather specific data points, verify information, and build out profiles based on strict parameters (usually handling 10-15 data sets per task).

- Assembling the pieces: Putting together text and data components into specific formats, ensuring every detail is perfectly aligned before it moves to the next stage of our system.

- Creating magic on demand: Rapidly formatting and generating custom documents and digital assets whenever our system triggers an immediate, time-sensitive request.

- Obsessive QC: Performing rigorous data validation and double-checking that every single data point perfectly matches our criteria before you hit execute.

- Taking absolute pride in your output: You don't just "do the task," you own the results. You take deep, personal responsibility for the quality of your work—if your name is on it, you guarantee it's 100?curate.

- Keeping score: Logging every action accurately in our tracking systems so our daily forecasting and production metrics stay flawless.

- Jumping into the new: We're a fast-moving team that’s always building and testing new workflows. You get genuinely excited to learn fresh processes, tackle new projects, and adapt quickly as we scale.





You should apply if:

- You have eagle-eyed attention to detail. Seriously, perfection is the baseline here. You spot typos from a mile away.

- You take total ownership. You don't just tick boxes. You manage your own workload, prioritize ruthlessly, and take deep personal pride in your output.

- You love a process (but you’re a problem-solver) . Repetitive tasks get you into a flow state. But if something breaks, you don't just wait around—you flag it instantly and where possible suggest a fix.

- You move fast. We promise lightning-fast turnarounds. You thrive under pressure and hit aggressive targets without letting your quality slip.

- You're a great communicator. You are fluent in English, write clearly, and firmly believe in winning as a team.

- You're highly adaptable. You pick up new softwares quickly, pivot instantly when project parameters change, and get genuinely excited to tackle fresh projects.

- You have a rock-solid setup. You have your own reliable PC/laptop and a fast internet connection that never lets you down.

title: Master’s Thesis Finalization Specialist (Formatting, Citation Audit, Final Submission)
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented academic editor or thesis specialist to bring a completed Master’s thesis to final submission-ready standard.



This role is not collaborative editing or ongoing revisions. The objective is simple:

Take a completed thesis and prepare it for final university submission with minimal client involvement.

This is a finish-line execution project for someone experienced with academic formatting, citation verification, and final document polishing.



Scope of Work (Required Deliverables)

The selected candidate will be responsible for the following:



1. University Formatting Compliance

Apply the university’s formatting guide exactly as specified (will provide guides and sample works).



This includes:

Margins

Heading structures

Pagination

Table of Contents formatting

Citation formatting

Appendices formatting

Section ordering



The formatting guide/booklet will be provided.

Strict compliance is required.



2. Reference & Citation Audit



Conduct a full audit of all references and citations.



Responsibilities include:

Verifying citation accuracy

Checking consistency between in-text citations and reference list

Correcting formatting errors

Resolving missing or inconsistent references

Ensuring compliance with the required citation style

3. Final Academic Polish



Perform final refinement of the document, including:

Grammar and sentence flow

Formatting consistency

Alignment and spacing issues

Removing formatting artifacts

Ensuring the thesis reads as one cohesive academic document

4. Submission-Ready Deliverables



Provide the final thesis in the required formats:

Microsoft Word (.docx)

PDF



The final output must meet a “ready for submission with no further edits required” standard.



Timeline:

Maximum of 3 weeks from project assignment.



Communication Model:



Minimal supervision

No routine check-ins

Only contact the client if:

A critical clarification is required

A structural issue affects the final deliverable



This role requires someone who can work independently and execute without hand-holding.



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone with:



Experience editing Master’s or PhD theses

Strong knowledge of academic formatting standards

Expertise in citation styles (APA, MLA, Chicago, etc.)

Advanced Microsoft Word formatting skills

Exceptional attention to detail

Ability to work independently and meet strict standards

How to Apply



Please submit:



A short introduction about your experience with thesis or dissertation editing

Examples of academic editing or formatting work (if available)

Confirmation that you can complete the project within 3 weeks for $300 CAD



Qualified candidates will be contacted for the next step.

description:

This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants stability, growth, and the chance to develop into a senior role over time.



???? The Role:

You will support the delivery of multiple eCommerce projects, working closely with the founder and senior team.

Your main focus will be organisation, coordination, and ensuring all tasks are completed on time and to a high standard.



???? Key Responsibilities:

• Assist in managing multiple Shopify and WooCommerce projects

• Create and manage tasks using tools like ClickUp or Asana

• Track timelines, deadlines, and deliverables

• Coordinate with developers, designers, and marketers

• Ensure tasks are completed accurately and on time

• Support client updates and communication

• Identify delays or blockers and report them early

• Keep all project documentation organised



???? Required Experience:

• 3-5+ years experience in project coordination, operations, or a similar role

• Experience working with digital projects and agencies

• Familiarity with Shopify, WooCommerce, or eCommerce is a big advantage

• Experience using project management tools

• Strong written and spoken English



???? What We’re Looking For:

Highly organised and detail-oriented, Reliable and consistent, Strong communicator, Able to follow processes and systems, Proactive and able to spot issues early, Eager to learn and grow within a team, Looking for a long-term role (not short-term freelance work)



???? Bonus Skills:

• Experience working with international teams (UK/US clients)

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or
 marketing

• Basic understanding of eCommerce or CRO

• Experience supporting website builds





???? Working Setup:

• Remote (Philippines-based)

• Full-time or part-time depending on experience

• Long-term role with clear progression into a senior position

• Competitive salary based on experience





???? What Success Looks Like:

• Tasks completed accurately and on time

• Projects stay organised and on schedule

• Clear communication with the team/clients

• Reduced delays and smoother project delivery

• Increasing responsibility over time



???? How to Apply:



Please include:

1. A short video introduction about yourself & your experience

2. Details of your previous roles and responsibilities

3. Any experience with Shopify, WooCommerce, or eCommerce

4. The tools you have used

5. Your availability





We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term and become a key part of the team.

Include your con-ta-ct info

title: Recruiting Coordinator
description:
## Who Are We?



Government technology has failed the public for decades, and Americans have been conditioned to expect websites from the 90s, even for the most important civic services.



Kaizen exists to restore citizens' trust in American public services by building technology that actually works. We partner with agencies at every level of government to replace legacy constituent service systems with modern, AI-native software that is worthy of the people they serve. We started in Parks and Recreation, and now we're building towards something much larger, the software layer that powers how Americans access the services their government owes them across all parts of government.



Our platform already reaches 40 million residents across 50+ agencies in 17 states. 



Founded in 2022 and based in New York City, Kaizen has raised $35 million from NEA, A16z, Accel, 776, and Carpenter Capital. We're builders, designers, and operators who believe that beautifully designed software isn't a luxury in government, but it's how you earn trust back.



## The Role



As our fractional Recruiting Coordinator, you'll be the operational engine behind a high-touch hiring process. We take candidate experience seriously - every interaction reflects how we operate and we need someone who can keep things moving with precision and warmth. This is a part-time contract role. The right person has done this before, doesn't need a lot of hand-holding, and can plug into an existing recruiting function and immediately reduce friction.



## **What You'll Do**



- Own interview scheduling end-to-end across multiple roles, and interview formats so candidates and interviewers always show up informed and on time

- Keep our ATS (Ashby) clean and current: stage updates, scorecards tracked, nothing falling through cracks

- Be a reliable, warm point of contact for candidates moving through the process - answering questions, managing logistics, and making the experience feel human

- Partner closely with our Recruiting Lead to keep pipelines moving and flag anything that's stalling

- Spot and flag process gaps and suggest improvements when you see them



## **What You Bring**



- 1+ years of recruiting coordination or interview scheduling experience, ideally in a startup or fast-moving environment

- Ashby experience is a strong plus

- Clear, professional, and human communications - candidates should feel cared for, not processed

- You can operate with autonomy and you don't need daily check-ins to stay on track

- Comfortable with ambiguity and a process that's still being built



## **Hours & Structure**



Roughly 10 - 15 hours per week. Flexible on schedule, but responsive turnarounds matter - we move quickly and expect coordination to keep pace.

title: Airbnb Management Customer Success Manager
description:
Company Description:

We operate a rapidly growing serviced accommodation management business that markets our properties on online travel agent (OTA) websites such as Airbnb and Booking .com. Catering to both leisure and contractor worker guests, we provide quality accommodations for those looking to stay at our properties across the UK. With a strong focus on expansion, we are actively working to increase the number of assets under management and strengthen our presence in the market. We are looking to grow to over 50 management properties over the next 12 months and are looking for an operations executive to help grow the business and take care of day to day operations, customer service/care and marketing.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced and proactive Short Term Rental Customer Success Manager to oversee and optimise daily operations for our portfolio of short-term rental properties in the UK. The ideal candidate is not only skilled in managing operations but is also passionate about growing the business rather than simply maintaining its current level. A strong drive to expand and improve operations is essential, as we are looking for someone who can contribute to the company’s continued growth and success.

This individual will work closely with cleaning teams, virtual assistants (VAs), and other stakeholders to ensure smooth property management, excellent guest communications, and scalable growth.

We are looking for a driven individual that wants to grow companies and make a difference, this role has strong promotion potential as we take on more management units.



*Key Responsibilities:*

Property Onboarding & Management:

- List and manage properties on OTA platforms and the company's channel manager (Hostaway).

- Ensure accurate property descriptions, pricing, and availability updates across channel manager, and all OTA’s.



Guest & Communication Management:

- Handle inbound calls from guests, OTA platforms, and cleaning staff.

- Conduct outbound calls for callbacks, follow-ups, business outreach, and cleaner coordination.

- Manage guest interactions using HostAway and SuiteOp to ensure seamless experiences.



Email & Scheduling Management:

- Maintain a zero inbox rule, ensuring prompt responses and organised email management.

- Schedule cleaning and maintenance services to maintain property quality.



Operational Support & Documentation:

- Complete ad-hoc administrative tasks such as document creation, spreadsheets, and presentations.

- Maintain strong team communication via ClickUp and WhatsApp to ensure workflow efficiency.





Key Qualifications:

- Minimum 1 Year of Experience in Airbnb/short-term property management (required).

- Customer Service Experience, with a strong ability to handle guest interactions professionally.

- Exceptional Written & Verbal Communication Skills in English.

- Confidence in Communication, particularly in speaking with individuals from the United Kingdom.

- Adaptability & Willingness to learn new systems and processes.

- Industry Knowledge, with experience or understanding of the real estate and Airbnb industry (in-depth training for the right candidate).



Key Softwares:

- Hostaway; manage the property across OTA’s (required or like for like software).

- Airbnb; communicating with guests, optimising the listings (required).

- Booking .com; communicating with guests, optimising the listings (required).

- SuiteOp; Guest portal system for ID check, security deposits, rental agreements (optional).

- PriceLabs; pricing management software (optional).

- Turno; cleaner management and automation software (optional).



Work Schedule:

- The role will consist of 40 hours per week (time to be confirmed, but roughly 14:00-22:00 GMT)

- 5 days per week

- Company office hours are between 08:30-22:00 GMT (Weekend and holiday coverage included), you are not expected to work outside of your shift hours.
